34413.title: The Musk Partisan Effect on Tesla Sales
34413.zh_title: 马斯克党派效应对特斯拉销量的影响
34413.authors: Kenneth T. Gillingham, Matthew Kotchen, James A. Levinsohn, Barry J. Nalebuff
34413.abstract: We study how Elon Musk's polarizing and partisan actions have impacted Tesla vehicle sales in the United States. Using county-level, monthly data on new vehicle registrations, we leverage how changes in vehicle sales over time diverge across counties with differing shares of Democratic and Republican voters. Without the Musk partisan effect, Tesla sales between October 2022 and April 2025 would have been 67-83% higher, equivalent to 1-1.26 million more vehicles. Musk’s partisan activities also increased the sales of other automakers' electric and hybrid vehicles 17-22% because of substitution, and undermined California’s progress in meeting its zero-emissions vehicle target.
34413.zh_abstract: 我们研究了埃隆·马斯克的两极分化且带有党派色彩的行为如何影响特斯拉在美国的汽车销量。利用县级月度新车注册数据，我们利用了不同民主党与共和党选民比例县之间汽车销量随时间变化的差异。如果没有马斯克的党派效应，2022年10月至2025年4月期间特斯拉的销量本应高出67-83%，相当于多售出100万至126万辆汽车。马斯克的党派活动还因替代效应使其他汽车制造商的电动和混合动力汽车销量增加了17-22%，并削弱了加利福尼亚州在实现其零排放车辆目标方面的进展。

34412.title: The Cook County Tax on Sweetened Beverages: The Impact on Purchases of its Announcement, Implementation, and Repeal
34412.zh_title: 库克县含糖饮料税：其宣布、实施和废除对购买行为的影响
34412.authors: Felipe Lozano Rojas, John Cawley, David E. Frisvold
34412.abstract: Taxes on sweetened beverages have been widely adopted in response to increases in diet-related chronic disease. An episode of particular interest occurred in Cook County, Illinois, where a beverage tax was announced, implemented, and then repealed. This paper is the first to estimate the effects of this tax using household-level data on purchases. We estimate difference-in-differences models that compare the change in beverage purchases over time in Cook County to that in comparison areas. The results indicate that consumer purchases did not detectably respond to the announcement of the tax. Implementation of the tax reduced purchases by 22.5% for all taxed beverages, 16.5% for high-calorie taxed beverages and a 33% for low-calorie (e.g. diet) taxed beverages. This implies a price elasticity of demand of -0.66 for all taxed beverages, -0.48 for high-calorie taxed beverages and -0.97 for low-calorie taxed beverages. The impact of the tax did not vary by household income, and there is no detectable impact of the tax on purchases of possible substitutes (bottled water, fruit juice, milk). After repeal of the tax, purchases of taxed beverages returned to their baseline quantities; there was no evidence of habit formation.
34412.zh_abstract: 为应对与饮食相关的慢性病增加，含糖饮料税已被广泛采用。一个特别值得关注的案例发生在伊利诺伊州库克县，那里的一项饮料税被宣布、实施，随后又被废除。本文首次使用家庭层面的购买数据来估计这项税收的影响。我们估计了双重差分模型，比较库克县与对照地区饮料购买量随时间的变化。结果表明，消费者购买行为对税收的宣布没有显著反应。税收的实施使所有应税饮料的购买量减少了22.5%，高热量应税饮料减少了16.5%，低热量（如无糖）应税饮料减少了33%。这意味着所有应税饮料的需求价格弹性为-0.66，高热量应税饮料为-0.48，低热量应税饮料为-0.97。税收的影响不因家庭收入而异，并且没有发现税收对可能的替代品（瓶装水、果汁、牛奶）购买量有显著影响。税收废除后，应税饮料的购买量恢复到基线水平；没有发现习惯形成的证据。
34412.meta: Programs：EH, LE, PE；JEL：H2, I12, I18, Q18

34411.title: Lessons for Automatic Fiscal Stabilizers from the Great Recession and the COVID Recession
34411.zh_title: 从大衰退和新冠疫情衰退中汲取的自动财政稳定器教训
34411.abstract: This paper simulates economic developments as if the discretionary fiscal stimulus enacted in the past two recessions had not occurred and additional automatic fiscal stabilizers had been deployed instead. For the calibration of key economic relationships most consistent with the empirical literature, we find that more sustained fiscal stimulus would have pushed unemployment down more rapidly following the Great Recession and that more limited stimulus would have caused inflation to increase much less following the COVID recession. We caution, though, that our estimates are uncertain given the large number of assumptions embedded in the calculations. Under different assumptions about the supply side of the economy when resource utilization is high, the stimulus enacted in early 2021 was not a significant cause of the observed runup in inflation that followed, and substituting an automatic stabilizer would have made little difference to inflation.
34411.zh_abstract: 本文模拟了经济情景，假设过去两次衰退中实施的自愿性财政刺激措施未曾发生，而是部署了额外的自动财政稳定器。对于与实证文献最为一致的关键经济关系校准，我们发现，更持续的财政刺激本会在“大衰退”后更快地降低失业率，而更有限的刺激本会使“新冠疫情衰退”后的通胀上升幅度小得多。然而，我们提醒，鉴于计算中包含了大量假设，我们的估计存在不确定性。在关于资源利用率高时经济供给侧的不同假设下，2021年初实施的刺激措施并非随后观察到的通胀飙升的重要原因，而用自动稳定器替代也不会对通胀产生显著影响。

34410.title: Managing Financial Crises
34410.authors: Gianluca Benigno, Alessandro Rebucci, Aliaksandr Zaretski
34410.abstract: In this paper, we revisit the question of how to manage financial crises using the framework proposed by Bianchi and Mendoza (2018). We show that this model economy exhibits a multiplicity of constrained-efficient equilibria, which arises because the private shadow value of collateral influences the forward-looking asset price. Among these equilibria, the specific one studied in Bianchi and Mendoza (2018) can be implemented using a tax/subsidy on debt alone. In that case, both the ex ante tax and ex post subsidy are quantitatively important for welfare under the optimal time-consistent policy. Limiting either component can lead to a welfare loss relative to the unregulated competitive equilibrium, highlighting the complementarity between crisis prevention and crisis resolution tools. We also show that, under certain conditions, all Pareto-dominant constrained-efficient equilibria entail the unconstrained allocation chosen by a social planner subject to the country budget constraint, and this allocation can be implemented with purely ex post policies.
34410.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们使用Bianchi和Mendoza（2018）提出的框架重新审视如何管理金融危机的问题。我们表明，该模型经济表现出多种受约束的有效均衡，这是由于抵押品的私人影子价值影响前瞻性资产价格而产生的。在这些均衡中，Bianchi和Mendoza（2018）研究的特定均衡可以仅通过债务税收/补贴来实现。在这种情况下，在最优时间一致性政策下，事前税收和事后补贴对福利都具有数量上的重要性。限制其中任何一个都可能导致相对于无监管竞争均衡的福利损失，这凸显了危机预防工具与危机解决工具之间的互补性。我们还表明，在某些条件下，所有帕累托占优的受约束有效均衡都包含由受国家预算约束的社会计划者选择的非约束性配置，并且这种配置可以通过纯粹的事后政策来实现。
34410.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ME, PE；JEL：E61, F38, H23

34409.title: Interpreting Turbulent Episodes in International Finance
34409.zh_title: 解读国际金融中的动荡时期
34409.abstract: We study the anatomy of the international portfolio finance network. As global financial linkages have become denser over time, cross-border portfolio equity positions have grown in importance relative to debt for Emerging markets and Advanced economies. Using the framework developed by Stavrakeva and Rey (2024), we construct a novel proxy of daily foreign investor holdings in both equity and long-term sovereign debt markets across 32 currency areas. Leveraging an instrumental variable strategy, we identify an effect of foreign equity ETF inflows on exchange rates and local stock market prices. Our high-frequency proxy enables us to interpret episodes of turbulence in international finance. It should prove useful to assess how persistent the current shocks to the international financial system are likely to be.
34409.zh_abstract: 我们研究了国际组合金融网络的结构。随着全球金融联系随时间推移变得更加密集，对于新兴市场和发达经济体而言，跨境股权投资相对于债务的重要性日益增长。利用Stavrakeva和Rey（2024）开发的框架，我们构建了一个新颖的代理变量，用于衡量32个货币区域内每日的外国投资者在股票和长期主权债务市场中的持有量。借助工具变量策略，我们识别出外国股票ETF流入对汇率和当地股票市场价格的影响。我们的高频代理变量使我们能够解读国际金融中的动荡时期。它应有助于评估当前对国际金融体系的冲击可能持续多久。

34408.title: Trade Policy Ambiguity
34408.abstract: This paper studies how Knightian uncertainty about the distribution of future trade policies affects current trade flows using a dynamic trade model with a sunk cost of exporting. Qualitatively, trade-policy ambiguity reduces export participation in a similar manner to standard trade-policy risk, but also increases sensitivity to tariff bounds, decreases sensitivity to the likelihood of a tariff increase, and can either increase or decrease sensitivity to tariff persistence. Quantitatively, ambiguity dampens the response of trade to persistent reforms and strengthens the response to transitory reforms.
34408.zh_abstract: 本文利用一个包含出口沉没成本的动态贸易模型，研究关于未来贸易政策分布的奈特不确定性如何影响当前贸易流动。从定性角度看，贸易政策模糊性以类似于标准贸易政策风险的方式减少了出口参与，但也增加了对关税上限的敏感性，降低了对关税上调可能性的敏感性，并且可能增加或减少对关税持续性的敏感性。从定量角度看，模糊性抑制了贸易对持久性改革的反应，并强化了对暂时性改革的反应。

34407.title: Intergenerational Mobility in Measures of Wellbeing: Consumption, Health and Life Satisfaction
34407.zh_title: 福祉指标中的代际流动性：消费、健康与生活满意度
34407.authors: Jonathan Davis, Nathan Deutscher, Bhashkar Mazumder
34407.abstract: Studies of intergenerational mobility have begun to expand outside of the traditional outcomes such as income, education and occupation, into using alternative measures of wellbeing. In this chapter we survey the evidence on studies of these alternative measures with a focus on health, consumption and life satisfaction. We also incorporate lessons from the income mobility literature that may be relevant for how we think about these alternative measures both conceptually and empirically. We highlight a few approaches that researchers can consider to incorporate alternative measures and we conclude that a widening of our conception of intergenerational mobility to incorporate measures of wellbeing may identify shortfalls in some of our current approaches.
34407.zh_abstract: 代际流动性的研究已开始从传统的收入、教育和职业等结果指标，扩展到使用替代性福祉指标。在本章中，我们综述了这些替代性指标的研究证据，重点关注健康、消费和生活满意度。我们还借鉴了收入流动性文献中的经验教训，这些教训可能对我们在概念上和实证上思考这些替代性指标的方式有所启发。我们强调了研究人员可以考虑纳入替代性指标的几种方法，并得出结论：拓宽我们对代际流动性的概念以纳入福祉指标，可能会揭示我们当前某些方法中的不足之处。

34406.title: Carbon Taxation and Firm Behavior in Emerging Economies: Evidence from South Africa
34406.zh_title: 碳税与新兴经济体的企业行为：来自南非的证据
34406.authors: Johannes Gallé, Rodrigo Oliveira, Daniel Overbeck, Nadine Riedel, Edson R. Severnini
34406.abstract: This paper provides the first comprehensive evidence on how firms in emerging economies respond to carbon taxation. Using detailed administrative data, we study the announcement and implementation of South Africa’s 2019 carbon tax—a potential trailblazer for other developing countries with limited state capacity amid the global expansion of carbon pricing. Contrary to concerns that carbon taxes might hinder growth or employment, we find no negative effects on firm performance or jobs. Firms facing higher effective tax rates increased activity following the tax’s announcement, four years before implementation, likely reflecting the resolution of regulatory uncertainty and efforts to mitigate stranded asset costs. While we find no measurable reduction in emissions—likely due to this anticipatory behavior—our results suggest that carbon taxation can be implemented without harming economic outcomes, even in the short term and in low- and middle-income settings.
34406.zh_abstract: 本文提供了关于新兴经济体企业如何应对碳税的首个全面证据。利用详细的行政数据，我们研究了南非2019年碳税的宣布与实施——在全球碳定价扩张的背景下，这可能是其他国家能力有限的发展中国家的潜在先行者。与碳税可能阻碍增长或就业的担忧相反，我们发现对企业绩效或就业没有负面影响。面临更高有效税率的企业在税收宣布后、实施前四年就增加了活动，这很可能反映了监管不确定性的解决以及减轻搁浅资产成本的努力。虽然我们没有发现可测量的排放减少——很可能是由于这种预期行为——但我们的结果表明，即使在短期内以及在低收入和中等收入环境中，碳税的实施也可以在不损害经济结果的情况下进行。
34406.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, LE, PE, POL, PR；JEL：H23, O13, O55, Q52, Q58

34405.title: Careers of Minimum Wage Workers
34405.zh_title: 最低工资工人的职业生涯
34405.authors: Sari Pekkala Kerr, William R. Kerr, Louis J. Maiden
34405.abstract: We characterize the careers of minimum wage workers by merging SIPP panels covering 1992-2016 into the LEHD. A long-run analysis shows strong earnings growth for these workers in subsequent decades, becoming indistinguishable from peers earning modestly more initially. Most of this growth is due to the steep earnings trajectories of young workers. Older workers earning minimum wages show a modest dip in earnings at that moment compared to earlier and later periods. Increases in state minimum wages do not significantly alter the future careers of workers who are on the minimum wage when the increases occur.
34405.zh_abstract: 我们通过将1992-2016年间的SIPP面板数据合并到LEHD中，来刻画最低工资工人的职业生涯。一项长期分析显示，这些工人在随后的几十年中收入增长强劲，最终与最初收入略高的同龄人难以区分。这种增长大部分归因于年轻工人陡峭的收入轨迹。与前后时期相比，领取最低工资的年长工人在该时刻的收入略有下降。州最低工资的提高并未显著改变在提高发生时处于最低工资水平的工人未来的职业生涯。
34405.meta: Programs：LS, PR；JEL：D31, E24, J21, J31, J38, J42, J62, J78

34404.title: Monetary Policy and Housing Overvaluation
34404.zh_title: 货币政策与住房市场高估
34404.authors: Nina Biljanovska, Eduardo Espuny Diaz, Amir Kermani, Rui C. Mano
34404.abstract: This paper examines how housing market overvaluation—measured by the price-to-rent ratio and its deviations from long-term trends—affects the transmission of monetary policy. Using U.S. metropolitan-level data and three measures of monetary policy shocks, we find that house prices respond more strongly to policy rate changes in overvalued markets. Examining buyer heterogeneity, we show that investor demand, proxied by non-owner-occupied purchases, declines more sharply after monetary tightening in these markets. These results are consistent with models of extrapolative beliefs and suggest that monetary policy can serve a stabilizing role during housing booms.
34404.zh_abstract: 本文考察了住房市场高估——以房价租金比及其对长期趋势的偏离来衡量——如何影响货币政策的传导。利用美国大都市层面的数据和三种货币政策冲击的衡量指标，我们发现，在高估市场中，房价对政策利率变化的反应更为强烈。通过考察购房者异质性，我们表明，在这些市场中，以非自住购买衡量的投资者需求在货币紧缩后下降得更剧烈。这些结果与外推信念模型一致，并表明货币政策在住房繁荣期间可以发挥稳定作用。

34403.title: The Relationship Between Certificate of Need Laws and Mortality
34403.zh_title: 需求证明法与死亡率之间的关系
34403.authors: Jonathan H. Cantor, Jill Horwitz, Christopher M. Whaley, Anthony Yu
34403.abstract: Certificate of Need (CON) laws regulate entry and capital investments in healthcare with the goal of containing costs while preserving access and quality. This paper examines the relationship between these laws and overall mortality as well as leading causes of mortality: cancer and cardiovascular disease. Using county-level death records, we conducted an event-study analysis comparing mortality rates in states that repealed their CON laws to states that did not between 1979 and 2004. The repeal of CON laws was associated with short-run reductions in cancer mortality, primarily from reductions in lung cancer mortality. Cardiovascular mortality and all-cause mortality rates were unchanged.
34403.zh_abstract: 需求证明法（CON）旨在通过控制成本同时保持可及性和质量，来监管医疗保健领域的进入和资本投资。本文考察了这些法律与总体死亡率以及主要死亡原因——癌症和心血管疾病——之间的关系。利用县级死亡记录，我们进行了一项事件研究分析，比较了1979年至2004年间废除CON法的州与未废除州的死亡率。CON法的废除与癌症死亡率的短期下降相关，这主要源于肺癌死亡率的下降。心血管疾病死亡率和全因死亡率没有变化。

34402.title: GDP Growth Expectations and Cash-flow Risk Premium
34402.zh_title: GDP增长预期与现金流风险溢价
34402.authors: William N. Goetzmann, Akiko Watanabe, Masahiro Watanabe
34402.abstract: We show that procyclical stocks–those whose cash flows rise with expected economic growth–earn higher average returns than countercyclical stocks. Leveraging nearly 75 years of economist survey data on real GDP growth expectations, we identify economic states while sidestepping model-driven forecast error. GDP forecasts comove with consumption and predict the market return, real GDP growth, and consumption growth. This approach builds on the literatures on both the Intertemporal and Consumption Capital Asset Pricing Models. We document a statistically significant, economically meaningful procyclicality premium that remains robust to standard factor controls.
34402.zh_abstract: 我们表明，顺周期股票——即那些现金流随预期经济增长而上升的股票——获得的平均回报高于逆周期股票。利用近75年经济学家关于实际GDP增长预期的调查数据，我们识别了经济状态，同时避免了模型驱动的预测误差。GDP预测与消费共同变动，并预测市场回报、实际GDP增长和消费增长。这种方法建立在跨期资本资产定价模型和消费资本资产定价模型两方面的文献基础上。我们记录了一个统计上显著、经济上有意义的顺周期溢价，该溢价在标准因子控制下仍然稳健。

34401.title: Strategic Avoidance and the Welfare Impacts of U.S. Solar Panel Tariffs
34401.zh_title: 战略性规避与美国太阳能电池板关税的福利影响
34401.authors: Todd D. Gerarden, Bryan K. Bollinger, Kenneth Gillingham, Daniel Xu
34401.abstract: This study examines the effects of tariffs imposed by the U.S. on imported solar panels. We first provide clear evidence that tariff-exposed firms shifted production to locations that did not face tariffs, and that domestic prices increased relative to other markets. We then develop a structural model to analyze welfare effects. We find that the tariffs generated modest gains for domestic manufacturers and for government revenues, but larger losses in domestic consumer surplus and environmental benefits, thereby reducing domestic welfare. Furthermore, the tariffs reduced domestic solar industry employment and wages. By contrast, subsidizing solar panel manufacturing could increase domestic production, employment, and welfare.
34401.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了美国对进口太阳能电池板征收关税的影响。我们首先提供明确证据，表明受关税影响的企业将生产转移到未面临关税的地区，并且国内价格相对于其他市场有所上涨。然后，我们开发了一个结构模型来分析福利效应。我们发现，关税为国内制造商和政府收入带来了适度收益，但国内消费者剩余和环境效益的损失更大，从而降低了国内福利。此外，关税减少了国内太阳能行业的就业和工资。相比之下，补贴太阳能电池板制造可以增加国内产量、就业和福利。

34400.title: Does Increasing Financial Access to Contraception in the U.S. Reduce Unintended Pregnancies? Evidence from the M-CARES Randomized Controlled Trial at Two Years
34400.zh_title: 在美国增加避孕药具的经济可及性能否减少非意愿妊娠？来自M-CARES随机对照试验两年的证据
34400.authors: Martha J. Bailey, Emilia Brito Rebolledo, Deniz Gorgulu, Kelsey Figone, Vanessa W. Lang, Alexa Prettyman, Vanessa Dalton
34400.abstract: We use a randomized controlled trial to examine how out-of-pocket costs affect contraceptive method choice, pregnancy, abortion, and childbirth among uninsured U.S. women. The study recruited women seeking care through Title X—a national family planning program subsidizing reproductive health services for low-income Americans—and randomized vouchers, making the full spectrum of contraception highly discounted or free. We find that subsidizing contraception has large and persistent effects on the choice of contraceptive method, resulting in significantly fewer pregnancies and abortions, but no effect on births, at 26 months.
34400.zh_abstract: 我们利用一项随机对照试验，考察自付费用如何影响未参保美国女性的避孕方法选择、怀孕、堕胎和生育。该研究招募了通过Title X——一项为低收入美国人提供生殖健康服务补贴的国家计划生育项目——寻求护理的女性，并随机发放代金券，使全系列避孕药具大幅折扣或免费。我们发现，补贴避孕药具对避孕方法的选择产生了巨大且持续的影响，导致在26个月时怀孕和堕胎显著减少，但对生育没有影响。

34439.title: Employment Relationships, Wage Setting, and Labor Market Power
34439.zh_title: 雇佣关系、工资设定与劳动力市场势力
34439.authors: Francesco Agostinelli, Domenico Ferraro, Giuseppe Sorrenti, Leonard Treuren
34439.abstract: We ask to what extent the quantification of labor market power depends on the modeling of the long-term worker-firm employment relationship. We develop an oligopsony model with dynamic wage contracts. Workers decide whether and where to work, choosing among firms providing different amenities and solving a dynamic discrete choice labor supply problem with firm-specific human capital. As a result, firms optimally choose wage-tenure contracts to attract and retain workers. We find that such contracts mitigate firms' incentives to impose large instantaneous wage markdowns—compared to standard static wage-setting models—thereby reducing the share of socially inefficient worker-firm separations. As a consequence, we show that the empirical approaches based on "sufficient statistics" tend to overestimate the extent of labor market power: low levels of firm-specific labor supply elasticities do not necessarily indicate rent extraction, but instead reflect firms’ ability to retain workers by offering long-term value through human capital accumulation.
34439.zh_abstract: 我们探究劳动力市场势力的量化在多大程度上依赖于对长期工人-企业雇佣关系的建模。我们构建了一个包含动态工资合同的寡头垄断模型。工人在提供不同福利的企业之间进行选择，决定是否工作以及在哪里工作，并解决一个包含企业特定人力资本的动态离散选择劳动力供给问题。因此，企业最优地选择工资-任期合同来吸引和留住工人。我们发现，与标准的静态工资设定模型相比，此类合同削弱了企业施加巨大瞬时工资压低的动机，从而减少了社会低效的工人-企业分离的份额。因此，我们表明，基于“充分统计量”的实证方法往往会高估劳动力市场势力的程度：低水平的企业特定劳动力供给弹性并不一定表明租金提取，而是反映了企业通过提供人力资本积累带来的长期价值来留住工人的能力。
34439.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, LS, PE；JEL：J0, J42, L10

34438.title: Environmental Catastrophe and the Direction of Invention: Evidence from the American Dust Bowl
34438.zh_title: 环境灾难与发明方向：来自美国沙尘暴的证据
34438.abstract: This paper investigates how innovation responded to and shaped the economic impact of the American Dust Bowl, an environmental catastrophe that led to widespread soil erosion on the US Plains during the 1930s. Combining data on county-level erosion, the historical geography of crop production, and crop-specific innovation, I document that in the wake of the environmental crisis, agricultural technology development was strongly and persistently re-directed toward more Dust Bowl-exposed crops and, within crops, toward bio-chemical and planting technologies that could directly mitigate economic losses from environmental distress. County-level exposure to Dust Bowl-induced innovation significantly dampened the effect of land erosion on agricultural land values and revenue. These results highlight the role of crises in spurring innovation and the importance of endogenous technological progress as an adaptive force in the face of disasters.
34438.zh_abstract: 本文研究了创新如何响应并塑造了美国沙尘暴的经济影响，沙尘暴是20世纪30年代导致美国大平原地区大面积土壤侵蚀的一场环境灾难。结合县级侵蚀数据、作物生产的历史地理数据以及作物特定创新数据，我记录了在环境危机之后，农业技术发展被强烈且持续地重新导向更易受沙尘暴影响的作物，并且在作物内部，转向能够直接减轻环境困境造成的经济损失的生物化学和种植技术。县级层面暴露于沙尘暴引发的创新显著抑制了土地侵蚀对农业土地价值和收入的影响。这些结果凸显了危机在激发创新中的作用，以及内生技术进步作为面对灾难时的适应力量的重要性。
34438.meta: Programs：DAE, EEE, PR；JEL：O3, O31, O33, Q1, Q16, Q54

34437.title: The (In)effectiveness of Targeted Payroll Tax Reductions
34437.zh_title: 定向工资税减免的（无）效性
34437.authors: Alessandra Fenizia, Nicholas Y. Li, Luca Citino
34437.abstract: This paper studies the cost-effectiveness of targeted payroll taxes for stimulating labor demand. It uses rich administrative data to study the effects of an Italian reform that raised social security contributions for apprenticeship contracts but granted a substantial discount for firms with 9 employees or less. The discount does not increase demand for apprenticeship contracts. Instead, it subsidizes inframarginal hiring. This reform is not cost-effective. Point estimates imply that each million euros of foregone social security contributions supports the employment of 29 apprentices for one year and no permanent contracts (these estimates are not statistically different from zero).
34437.zh_abstract: 本文研究了定向工资税在刺激劳动力需求方面的成本效益。它利用丰富的行政数据来研究意大利一项改革的影响，该改革提高了学徒合同的社会保障缴款，但为拥有9名或更少员工的企业提供了大幅折扣。该折扣并未增加对学徒合同的需求。相反，它补贴了边际内雇佣。这项改革不具有成本效益。点估计表明，每减少一百万欧元的社会保障缴款，可以支持29名学徒一年的就业，并且没有永久合同（这些估计在统计上不显著异于零）。

34436.title: Monetary Policy without an Anchor
34436.authors: Luigi Bocola, Alessandro Dovis, Kasper Jørgensen, Rishabh Kirpalani
34436.abstract: Policymakers often cite the risk that inflation expectations might “de-anchor” as a key reason for responding forcefully to inflationary shocks. We develop a model to analyze this trade-off and to quantify the benefits of stable long-run inflation expectations. In our framework, households and firms are imperfectly informed about the central bank’s objective and learn from its policy choices. Recognizing this interaction, the central bank raises interest rates more aggressively after adverse supply shocks and accepts short-run output costs to secure more stable inflation expectations. The strength of this reputation channel depends on how sensitive long-run inflation expectations are to surprises in interest rates. Using high-frequency identification, we estimate these elasticities for emerging and advanced economies and find large negative values for Brazil. We fit our model to these findings and use it to quantify how reputation building motives affect monetary policy decisions, and the role of central bank's credibility in promoting macroeconomic stability.
34436.zh_abstract: 政策制定者经常引用通胀预期可能“脱锚”的风险，作为对通胀冲击做出有力反应的关键原因。我们开发了一个模型来分析这种权衡，并量化稳定的长期通胀预期的好处。在我们的框架中，家庭和企业对央行的目标信息不完全，并从其政策选择中学习。认识到这种互动，央行在面临不利供给冲击后会更积极地提高利率，并接受短期产出成本，以确保更稳定的通胀预期。这种声誉渠道的强度取决于长期通胀预期对利率意外的敏感程度。利用高频识别，我们估计了新兴经济体和发达经济体的这些弹性，并发现巴西的数值很大且为负。我们将模型拟合到这些发现中，并用它来量化声誉建设动机如何影响货币政策决策，以及央行可信度在促进宏观经济稳定中的作用。

34435.title: Cannabis and Respiratory Health
34435.authors: Jayani Jayawardhana, Jialin Hou, Johanna Catherine Maclean
34435.abstract: Cannabis legalization has increased substantially in the past two decades with state-level policies that permit possession this product. A potential concern with cannabis legalization and the corresponding increase in consumption is that – because smoking is the most common consumption mode – respiratory health could worsen. In this study, we offer new evidence on the impact of recreational cannabis laws on asthma outcomes. To do so, we combine commercial health insurance claims and survey data over the period 2008 to 2022 with difference-in-differences and event-study methods. Our findings suggest that asthma diagnoses do not change following legalization of recreational cannabis, while asthma-related dispensed prescription medications decline, and asthma-related outpatient visits and inpatient hospitalizations are stable. An analysis of changes in use of smoked and non-smoked cannabis post-law suggests that, on net, the increase in overall cannabis use attributable to legalization is driven by use of non-smoked cannabis, which may explain why we find limited evidence that asthma outcomes worsen post-law. Collectively, these results suggest that expanded access to legal cannabis has not worsened respiratory health overall, and hint that some patients may use cannabis to manage asthma symptoms.
34435.zh_abstract: 在过去二十年中，随着允许持有该产品的州级政策出台，大麻合法化显著增加。大麻合法化及相应消费增长的一个潜在担忧是——由于吸食是最常见的消费方式——呼吸系统健康可能会恶化。在这项研究中，我们提供了关于娱乐性大麻法律对哮喘结果影响的新证据。为此，我们将2008年至2022年期间的商业健康保险索赔数据和调查数据与双重差分法和事件研究法相结合。我们的研究结果表明，在娱乐性大麻合法化后，哮喘诊断没有变化，而哮喘相关的处方药配药量下降，哮喘相关的门诊就诊和住院治疗保持稳定。对法律实施后吸食和非吸食大麻使用变化的分析表明，净而言，合法化导致的大麻总体使用量增加是由非吸食大麻的使用驱动的，这或许可以解释为什么我们发现法律实施后哮喘结果恶化的证据有限。总的来说，这些结果表明，扩大合法大麻的获取并未总体上恶化呼吸系统健康，并暗示一些患者可能使用大麻来控制哮喘症状。

34434.title: The Financial Consequences of Being Denied Benefit Access
34434.zh_title: 被拒绝福利准入的财务后果
34434.authors: Tatiana Homonoff, Min S. Lee, Katherine Meckel
34434.abstract: We examine the causal impact of being denied benefit access on the financial well-being of marginally-excluded households. Using experimental and quasi-random variation in the flexibility of mandatory intake interviews and a unique linkage between administrative Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) and credit report data, we find that households screened out of SNAP due to administrative barriers suffer tangible downstream economic consequences. Specifically, we find that process-related denials increase debt and delinquencies, and decrease credit scores. These results highlight the economic importance of implementation design and its role in strengthening (or undermining) the financial protection provided by social insurance programs.
34434.zh_abstract: 我们研究了被拒绝福利准入对边际被排斥家庭财务福祉的因果影响。利用强制性入职面试灵活性的实验性和准随机变化，以及行政补充营养援助计划（SNAP）与信用报告数据之间的独特关联，我们发现，因行政障碍而被筛选出SNAP的家庭会遭受切实的下游经济后果。具体来说，我们发现与流程相关的拒绝增加了债务和拖欠，并降低了信用评分。这些结果凸显了实施设计的经济重要性，及其在加强（或削弱）社会保险计划提供的财务保护方面的作用。

34433.title: Pushing Back Against Private Practice: The Unintended Effects of Paying Public Doctors More
34433.zh_title: 抵制私人执业：提高公立医生薪酬的意外后果
34433.authors: Jonathan Gruber, Núria Mas, Judit Vall Castelló, Jaume Vives-i-Bastida
34433.abstract: Most nations in the world have side-by-side private and public health care systems. Policymakers worry that “dual practice” across sectors might reduce care to the public sector. This concern led regions in Spain to offer “exclusivity bonuses” to physicians who practice exclusively in the public sector. We show theoretically that the impact of these bonuses on the public sector is ambiguous. We demonstrate empirically that the bonuses backfired: they did increase exclusive participation in the public sector, but significantly reduced hours of work. When regions added offsetting bonuses for dual practice, they were largely ineffective.
34433.zh_abstract: 世界上大多数国家都有并行的私人和公共医疗保健系统。政策制定者担心跨部门的“双重执业”可能会减少对公共部门的医疗服务。这种担忧导致西班牙各地区向仅在公共部门执业的医生提供“排他性奖金”。我们从理论上表明，这些奖金对公共部门的影响是不确定的。我们通过实证证明，这些奖金适得其反：它们确实增加了在公共部门的排他性参与，但显著减少了工作时间。当各地区增加针对双重执业的补偿性奖金时，这些奖金基本上无效。

34432.title: Voting with Their Feet: Democratic Backsliding and Market-Minded Migration - Evidence from Israel and Europe
34432.zh_title: 用脚投票：民主倒退与市场导向的移民——来自以色列和欧洲的证据
34432.abstract:
Using a comparative framework, the study examines how variations in political regimes across Israel and Europe shape patterns of international migration. In both contexts, episodes of democratic backsliding serve as quasi-exogenous shocks that reveal the causal link between institutional erosion and outward mobility.
In Israel, the origin of democratic backsliding lies in a corruption shock—the criminal indictment of the prime minister—which escalated into an executive–judicial shock as the government launched an anti-democratic judicial overhaul. This confrontation between the executive and judiciary provides a natural experiment for identifying how institutional breakdowns shape migration decisions.
In Europe, the origin of democratic backsliding stems from a “Syrian shock”—a massive refugee inflow that strained administrative capacity, polarized politics, and weakened liberal institutions. The resulting governance erosion triggered emigration responses structurally like those observed in Israel.
Using a difference-in-differences (DiD) estimation, the study identifies causal effects of democratic erosion on migration flows. Across both settings, out-migration emerges as a market-minded response to illiberal regime change—a behavioral signal of sensitivity to policies that features nationalizing industries, restrict free speech, and undermine the rule of law. Together, the Israeli and European experiences demonstrate that illiberal governance functions as a systemic push factor for emigration, beyond standard economic explanations.
34432.zh_abstract: 本研究采用比较框架，考察了以色列和欧洲政治体制的差异如何塑造国际移民模式。在这两种背景下，民主倒退事件作为准外生冲击，揭示了制度侵蚀与向外流动之间的因果关系。在以色列，民主倒退的根源在于一场腐败冲击——总理的刑事起诉——这升级为一场行政-司法冲击，因为政府发起了一场反民主的司法改革。行政与司法之间的这场对抗为识别制度崩溃如何塑造移民决策提供了一个自然实验。在欧洲，民主倒退的根源在于一场“叙利亚冲击”——大规模难民涌入，这给行政能力带来压力，使政治两极分化，并削弱了自由制度。由此产生的治理侵蚀引发了与在以色列观察到的结构相似的移民反应。使用双重差分法估计，本研究识别了民主侵蚀对移民流动的因果效应。在这两种背景下，向外移民表现为对非自由体制变革的市场导向反应——这是一种行为信号，表明对以国有化产业、限制言论自由和破坏法治为特征的政策敏感。总之，以色列和欧洲的经验表明，非自由治理是移民的体制性推动因素，超越了标准的经济解释。

34431.title: Planes Overhead: How Airplane Noise Impacts Home Values
34431.zh_title: 头顶飞机：航空噪音如何影响房价
34431.authors: Florian Allroggen, R. John Hansman, Christopher R. Knittel, Jing Li, Xibo Wan, Juju Wang
34431.abstract: Air transportation supports economic growth and global connectivity but imposes localized environmental costs, particularly through aircraft noise. We estimate the causal effect of aviation noise on housing prices using quasi-experimental variation from the Federal Aviation Administration's rollout of performance-based navigation (PBN) procedures and runway reconfigurations at three major U.S. airports. Combining high-resolution flight trajectory data with geocoded housing transactions, we apply a difference-in-differences hedonic framework to identify changes in exposure unanticipated by residents. A one-decibel increase in annual day-night average sound level reduces house prices by 0.6 to 1.0 percent. Among alternative noise metrics, average exposure explains property value impacts most strongly. Willingness to pay for quieter conditions varies systematically with income and race, indicating that aircraft noise externalities have meaningful distributional consequences. Our results highlight the need to incorporate localized environmental costs into aviation and urban land-use policy.
34431.zh_abstract: 航空运输支撑经济增长和全球连通性，但会带来局部环境成本，尤其是通过飞机噪音。我们利用美国联邦航空管理局在三个主要机场推行基于性能的导航程序和跑道重新配置的准实验变化，估计了航空噪音对房价的因果效应。结合高分辨率飞行轨迹数据与地理编码的住房交易数据，我们应用双重差分特征模型来识别居民未预料到的噪音暴露变化。年昼夜平均声级每增加一分贝，房价下降0.6%至1.0%。在替代噪音指标中，平均暴露量对房产价值的影响解释力最强。为更安静环境付费的意愿随收入和种族系统性地变化，表明飞机噪音外部性具有显著分配后果。我们的结果凸显了将局部环境成本纳入航空和城市土地利用政策的必要性。
34431.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, PE；JEL：L51, L62, L85, Q53

34430.title: Political Information and Network Effects
34430.authors: Georgy Egorov, Sergei Guriev, Maxim Mironov, Ekaterina Zhuravskaya
34430.abstract: Why do political campaigns so often yield unexpected results? We address this question by separately estimating the direct effect of a campaign on targeted voters and the indirect effect on others in the same social environment. Partnering with a local NGO during Argentina’s 2023 presidential election, we randomized the distribution of leaflets providing an expert assessment of the likely consequences of certain proposals by the outsider candidate Javier Milei. Exploiting Argentina’s unique sub-precinct election reporting system, we show that the campaign reduced Milei’s support among directly treated voters, as expected, but increased his support among untreated voters in treated precincts, producing a backfiring, net-positive effect for Milei. A pre-registered replication confirmed these opposite-signed effects. Using theory and a survey experiment, we show that the minority of voters who disbelieved the campaign were more motivated to discuss it with peers, convincing them to support Milei. This mobilization effect appears especially likely when campaigns criticize outsider candidates. Our results highlight how campaigns aimed at anti-elite candidates can unintentionally mobilize support for them.
34430.zh_abstract: 为什么政治竞选常常产生出乎意料的结果？我们通过分别估计竞选对目标选民的直接影响和对同一社会环境中其他人的间接效应来探讨这一问题。在阿根廷2023年总统选举期间，我们与一家当地非政府组织合作，随机分发传单，提供专家对局外人候选人哈维尔·米莱某些提案可能后果的评估。利用阿根廷独特的子选区选举报告系统，我们显示，该竞选按预期减少了直接受处理选民对米莱的支持，但在受处理选区的未处理选民中增加了对他的支持，产生了适得其反的净正面效应。一项预先注册的复制实验证实了这些符号相反的效应。通过理论和调查实验，我们表明，少数不相信该竞选的选民更有动力与同伴讨论，从而说服他们支持米莱。当竞选批评局外人候选人时，这种动员效应似乎尤其可能发生。我们的结果凸显了针对反精英候选人的竞选如何可能无意中动员对他们的支持。

34429.title: AVE Tariffs are a Misleading Measure of Tariff Policy
34429.zh_title: 从价关税等值是关税政策的误导性衡量指标
34429.authors: Andrew Greenland, James Lake, John Lopresti
34429.abstract: We show that changes in ad valorem equivalent (AVE) tariffs are insufficient to sign the effect of tariffs on economic outcomes. Using a novel database of 1972-1988 US tariffs, we decompose aggregate AVEs into statutory and endogenous components. Pre-1979, inflation creates an “accidental liberalization” by eroding specific tariffs, while import composition changes mask 1980s Tokyo Round tariff cuts. Overall, as much as 70% of the variation in aggregate AVE changes is driven by mechanisms other than statutory tariff changes. Embedding specific tariffs in a hat algebra framework, we show that the accidental liberalization accounts for half of 1972-1988 AVE changes. The resulting impact on imports and price indices depends on whether price movements were driven by import demand or export supply shocks. If driven by export supply shocks, the accidental liberalization is associated with falling imports and rising import price indices.
34429.zh_abstract: 我们表明，从价关税等值的变化不足以确定关税对经济结果的影响。利用1972-1988年美国关税的新数据库，我们将总从价关税等值分解为法定成分和内生成分。1979年之前，通货膨胀通过侵蚀从量关税造成了“意外自由化”，而进口构成变化掩盖了1980年代东京回合的关税削减。总体而言，总从价关税等值变化中多达70%是由法定关税变化以外的机制驱动的。将从量关税嵌入帽子代数框架，我们显示意外自由化解释了1972-1988年从价关税等值变化的一半。其对进口和价格指数的最终影响取决于价格变动是由进口需求还是出口供给冲击驱动的。如果由出口供给冲击驱动，意外自由化与进口下降和进口价格指数上升相关。

34428.title: Vulnerability of the Public Safety System: Evidence from Micro-Shocks
34428.zh_title: 公共安全系统的脆弱性：来自微观冲击的证据
34428.authors: Shooshan Danagoulian, Monica Deza, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Alberto Ortega
34428.abstract: The 911 system, a vital component of public safety, responds to over 210 million emergency calls each year. We examine the effect of small exogenous public health stressors – pollen emissions – on the operation of the 911 call system in Seattle, Washington. Leveraging daily variation in pollen levels, we evaluate pollen’s impact on the volume of 911 calls. We find that a 100% increase in pollen levels – the modal day-over-day variation we observe in our data – results in six additional 911 calls per day. We further show that elevated pollen levels influence the quality of emergency and non-emergency response. The 911 system responds to increased strain by prioritizing more urgent calls – and as a result, increasing response time to non-urgent calls. Though all calls are connected to a dispatcher, there are increased missed connections – canceled emergency response, missing records of response, and false reports. Despite the prioritization of urgent calls, these additional daily calls lead to reallocation of resources in ways that potentially impede service quality. Thus, our findings suggest that common and small shocks may lead to under-provision of valuable services to communities across the U.S.
34428.zh_abstract: 911系统是公共安全的重要组成部分，每年响应超过2.1亿个紧急电话。我们研究了微小的外生公共卫生压力因素——花粉排放——对华盛顿州西雅图市911呼叫系统运行的影响。利用花粉水平的日度变化，我们评估了花粉对911呼叫量的影响。我们发现，花粉水平增加100%（我们在数据中观察到的典型日环比变化）会导致每天额外增加六个911呼叫。我们进一步表明，花粉水平升高会影响紧急和非紧急响应的质量。911系统通过优先处理更紧急的呼叫来应对增加的压力，结果导致非紧急呼叫的响应时间增加。尽管所有呼叫都接通了调度员，但错失连接（取消的紧急响应、缺失的响应记录和虚假报告）有所增加。尽管优先处理了紧急呼叫，这些额外的每日呼叫导致资源重新分配，可能阻碍服务质量。因此，我们的发现表明，常见的小冲击可能导致美国各地社区有价值服务的供给不足。

34427.title: Modeling and Measuring the Genetic Determinants of Child Development
34427.zh_title: 儿童发展遗传决定因素的建模与测量
34427.abstract: The longstanding debate over whether human capabilities and skills are shaped more by “nature” or “nurture” has been revitalized by recent advances in genetics, particularly in the use of polygenic scores (PGSs) to proxy for genetic endowments. Yet, we argue that PGSs embed not only direct genetic effects but also indirect environmental influences, raising questions about their validity for causal analysis. We show that these conflated measures can mislead studies of gene–environment interactions, especially when parental behavior responds to children’s genetic risk. To address this issue, we construct a new latent measure of genetic risk that integrates individual genotypes with diagnostic symptoms, using data from the National Longitudinal Study of Adolescent to Adult Health linked to restricted individual SNP-level genotypes from dbGaP. Exploiting multiple sources of variation—including the Mendelian within-family genetic randomization among siblings—we find consistent evidence that parents compensate by investing more in children with higher genetic risk for ADHD. Strikingly, these compensatory responses disappear when genetic risk is proxied by the conventional ADHD PGS, which also yields weaker—and in some cases reversed—predictions for long-run outcomes. Finally, we embed our latent measure of genetic endowments into a standard dynamic structural model of child development. The model shows that both parental investments and latent genetic risk jointly shape children’s cognitive and mental health development, underscoring the importance of modeling the dynamic interplay between genes and environments in the formation of human capital.
34427.zh_abstract: 关于人类能力和技能更多由“先天”还是“后天”塑造的长期争论，因遗传学的最新进展（尤其是使用多基因评分作为遗传禀赋代理变量）而重新活跃。然而，我们认为多基因评分不仅嵌入直接遗传效应，还嵌入间接环境影响，这引发了对其因果分析有效性的质疑。我们表明，这些混淆的衡量指标可能误导基因-环境相互作用的研究，尤其是当父母行为对儿童的遗传风险做出反应时。为解决这一问题，我们利用全国青少年至成人健康纵向研究的数据，结合dbGaP中受限的个人单核苷酸多态性基因型，构建了一个新的遗传风险潜在衡量指标，该指标整合了个人基因型与诊断症状。利用多种变异来源（包括兄弟姐妹间的孟德尔家族内遗传随机化），我们发现一致证据表明，父母通过向遗传风险较高的儿童投入更多来补偿其注意力缺陷多动障碍风险。引人注目的是，当遗传风险由传统的注意力缺陷多动障碍多基因评分代理时，这些补偿性反应消失，该评分对长期结果的预测也更弱，在某些情况下甚至相反。最后，我们将遗传禀赋的潜在衡量指标嵌入标准的儿童发展动态结构模型。该模型显示，父母投资和潜在遗传风险共同塑造儿童的认知和心理健康发展，强调了在人力资本形成中对基因与环境动态相互作用进行建模的重要性。
34427.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：D10, H0, I1, I2, I20, J01, J1

34426.title: The Role of Private Debt in the Financial Ecosystem
34426.zh_title: 私人债务在金融生态系统中的作用
34426.abstract: This paper provides a comprehensive introduction to private debt, examines the key drivers behind its expansion, and frames the discussion around potential risk accumulation in the broader economy. Overall, the development of private debt can be viewed as the emergence of a new technology that facilitated the expansion of the high-yield corporate debt market into the middle market. Throughout its history, the evolution of the high-yield debt and the rise of private debt have been closely intertwined with the growth of private equity. Historically, banks have not had significant exposure to financing buyouts or other highly leveraged transactions, whether in the large-cap or mid-cap segments.
34426.zh_abstract: 本文对私人债务进行了全面介绍，考察了其扩张背后的关键驱动因素，并围绕更广泛经济中潜在风险积累的框架展开讨论。总体而言，私人债务的发展可被视为一种新技术的出现，该技术促进了高收益公司债务市场向中端市场的扩张。纵观其历史，高收益债务的演变和私人债务的兴起一直与私募股权的增长紧密交织。从历史上看，无论是在大盘股还是中盘股领域，银行对收购融资或其他高杠杆交易的敞口并不显著。

34425.title: Same Crime, Different Time: Disparities in Judicial Outcomes for DWI Offenders
34425.zh_title: 相同罪行，不同判决：酒驾罪犯司法结果中的差异
34425.authors: Jeffrey T. Denning, Benjamin Hansen, Lars Lefgren, Emily C. Leslie, Cody Tuttle
34425.abstract: We examine disparities in judicial outcomes among people charged with Driving While Intoxicated (DWI), a setting in which legal guilt is objectively determined by breath alcohol content (BrAC). Focusing on first-time offenders with no aggravating circumstances and BrAC above the legal threshold, we find that race, gender, and financial resources strongly predict the likelihood of incarceration and case dismissal. Defendants with greater socioeconomic advantage are more likely to access rehabilitative alternatives and avoid criminal records. We discuss how these outcome differences may reflect not only disparities in options offered by the court, but also in defendants’ choices among them.
34425.zh_abstract: 我们研究了被控酒驾者司法结果中的差异，在此情境中，法律上的有罪性由呼气酒精浓度客观确定。聚焦于无加重情节且呼气酒精浓度超过法定阈值的初犯者，我们发现种族、性别和财务资源强烈预测监禁和案件撤销的可能性。社会经济优势较大的被告更有可能获得康复替代方案并避免犯罪记录。我们讨论了这些结果差异如何不仅反映法院提供选项的差异，也反映被告在这些选项中选择的差异。
34425.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PE；JEL：D63, J15, J78, K14, K42

34424.title: The Price of Intelligence: How Should Socially-minded Firms Price and Deploy AI?
34424.zh_title: 智能的代价：社会导向型企业应如何定价和部署人工智能？
34424.abstract: Leading AI firms claim to prioritize social welfare. How should firms with a social mandate price and deploy AI? We derive pricing formulas that depart from profit maximization by incorporating incentives to improve welfare and reduce labor disruptions. Using US data, we evaluate several scenarios. A welfarist firm that values both profit and welfare should price closer to marginal cost, as efficiency gains outweigh distributional concerns. A conservative firm focused on labor-market stability should price above the profit-maximizing level in the short run, especially when its AI may displace low-income workers. Overall, socially minded firms face a trade-off between expanding access to AI and the resulting loss in profits and labor market risks.
34424.zh_abstract: 领先的人工智能公司声称优先考虑社会福利。具有社会使命的企业应如何定价和部署人工智能？我们推导了定价公式，这些公式偏离利润最大化，纳入了改善福利和减少劳动力中断的激励。利用美国数据，我们评估了几种情景。一个同时重视利润和福利的福利主义企业应将价格定得更接近边际成本，因为效率收益超过分配关切。一个专注于劳动力市场稳定的保守型企业应在短期内将价格定得高于利润最大化水平，尤其是当其人工智能可能取代低收入工人时。总体而言，社会导向型企业面临扩大人工智能可及性与由此导致的利润损失和劳动力市场风险之间的权衡。

34423.title: We Won't be Missed: Work and Growth in the AGI World
34423.zh_title: 我们不会被怀念：通用人工智能世界中的工作与增长
34423.abstract: This chapter explores the long-run implications of Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) for economic growth and labor markets. AGI makes it feasible to perform all economically valuable work using compute. I distinguish between bottleneck and supplementary work—tasks that are essential versus non-essential for unhindered growth. As computational resources expand: (i) the economy automates all bottleneck work, (ii) some supplementary work may be left exclusively to humans, (iii) output becomes linear in compute and labor and its growth is driven by the expansion of compute, (iv) wages converge to the opportunity cost of computational resources required to reproduce human work, and (v) the share of labor income in GDP converges to zero.
34423.zh_abstract: 本章探讨了通用人工智能（AGI）对经济增长和劳动力市场的长期影响。AGI使得利用计算资源执行所有具有经济价值的工作成为可能。我将工作区分为瓶颈性工作和补充性工作——即对无阻碍增长而言至关重要与非至关重要的任务。随着计算资源的扩张：（i）经济将自动化所有瓶颈性工作，（ii）部分补充性工作可能完全留给人类完成，（iii）产出与计算和劳动力呈线性关系，其增长由计算资源的扩张驱动，（iv）工资趋近于复制人类工作所需计算资源的机会成本，以及（v）劳动收入占GDP的份额趋近于零。

34422.title: The Value of Banking Relationships
34422.abstract: Commercial banking is an industry in which long-term, nonexclusive relationships between bankers and their borrowers are governed by short-term contracts. This paper documents the nature of bank-borrower relationships in a historical setting. We use a new dataset of 55,000 loans to 10,000 unique borrowers over 35 years in the mid-nineteenth century. Two-way fixed effects models reveal that a one standard deviation increase in the number of previous loans leads to an increase in loan size by 4.72%. A one-year increase in the duration of a relationship leads to an increase in loan size of 5.6%. Relationships have small effects on loan rates, but substantial effects on collateral. Borrowers with relationships with competing banks receive substantially smaller loans. Propensity score matching reveals that banks learn about borrowers early in the relationship. Finally, the bank severed relationships with about half of the borrowers who defaulted on a loan. A surviving relationship becomes more valuable after default.
34422.zh_abstract: 商业银行是一个由短期合同约束银行家与借款人之间长期、非排他性关系的行业。本文在一个历史背景下记录了银行-借款人关系的本质。我们使用了一个包含19世纪中期35年间10000个独特借款人的55000笔贷款的新数据集。双向固定效应模型显示，先前贷款数量每增加一个标准差，贷款规模增加4.72%。关系持续时间每增加一年，贷款规模增加5.6%。关系对贷款利率影响较小，但对抵押品影响显著。与竞争银行有关系的借款人获得的贷款规模显著更小。倾向得分匹配显示，银行在关系早期就了解借款人。最后，银行与大约一半违约借款人断绝了关系。违约后幸存的关系变得更有价值。

34421.title: Political Power and Mortality: Heterogeneous Effects of the U.S. Voting Rights Act
34421.zh_title: 政治权力与死亡率：美国投票权法案的异质性效应
34421.authors: Atheendar Venkataramani, Rourke O'Brien, Elizabeth F. Bair, Christopher A. Lowenstein
34421.abstract: We study the health consequences of redistributing political power through the 1975 extension of the Voting Rights Act, which eliminated barriers to voting for previously disenfranchised nonwhite populations. The intervention led to broad declines in under-five mortality but sharply contrasting effects in other age groups: mortality fell among non-white children, younger adults, and older women, yet rose among whites and older non-white men. These differences cannot be reconciled by changes in population composition or material conditions. Instead, we present evidence suggesting psychosocial stress and retaliatory responses arising from perceived status threat as key mechanisms.
34421.zh_abstract: 我们研究了通过1975年《投票权法案》扩展重新分配政治权力对健康的影响，该法案消除了先前被剥夺选举权的非白人人口的投票障碍。这一干预措施导致五岁以下儿童死亡率普遍下降，但在其他年龄组中产生了截然相反的效应：非白人儿童、年轻成年人和老年女性的死亡率下降，而白人和老年非白人男性的死亡率上升。这些差异无法通过人口构成或物质条件的变化来解释。相反，我们提出的证据表明，源于感知地位威胁的心理社会压力和报复性反应是关键机制。
34421.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PE, POL；JEL：D72, I10, I14, I18, K38, P00

34420.title: The Prestakes of Stock Market Investing
34420.authors: Francesco Bianchi, Do Q. Lee, Sydney C. Ludvigson, Sai Ma
34420.abstract: How rational is the stock market and how efficiently does it process information? We use machine learning to establish a practical measure of rational and efficient expectation formation while identifying distortions and inefficiencies in the subjective beliefs of market participants. The algorithm independently learns, stays attentive to fundamentals, credit risk, and sentiment, and makes abrupt course-corrections at critical junctures. By contrast, the subjective beliefs of investors, professionals, and equity analysts do little of this and instead contain predictable mistakes–prestakes–that are especially prevalent in times of market turbulence. Trading schemes that bet against prestakes deliver defensive strategies with large CAPM and Fama-French 5-factor alphas.
34420.zh_abstract: 股票市场有多理性？它处理信息的效率有多高？我们使用机器学习建立了一个衡量理性与有效预期形成的实用指标，同时识别市场参与者主观信念中的扭曲和低效。该算法独立学习，持续关注基本面、信用风险和情绪，并在关键时刻进行突然的路线修正。相比之下，投资者、专业人士和股票分析师的主观信念很少做到这一点，反而包含可预测的错误——预赌——这些错误在市场动荡时期尤为普遍。针对预赌进行反向交易的策略提供了具有较大CAPM和Fama-French五因子阿尔法的防御性策略。

34419.title: An Inverse-Ramsey Tax Rule
34419.authors: Luca Micheletto, Dylan T. Moore, Daniel Reck, Joel Slemrod
34419.abstract: Traditional optimal commodity tax analysis, dating back to Ramsey (1927), prescribes that to maximize welfare one should impose higher taxes on goods with lower demand elasticities. Yet policy makers do not stress minimizing efficiency costs as a desideratum. In this note we revisit the commodity tax problem, and show that the attractiveness of the Ramsey inverse-elasticity prescription can itself be inverted if the tax system is chosen – or at least strongly influenced – by taxpayers who are overly confident of their ability, relative to others, to substitute away from taxed goods.
34419.zh_abstract: 传统的商品税最优分析，可追溯到拉姆齐（1927），规定为了最大化福利，应对需求弹性较低的商品征收更高的税收。然而，政策制定者并未将最小化效率成本作为首要目标。在本注释中，我们重新审视商品税问题，并表明如果税收体系是由那些对自己（相对于他人）替代应税商品的能力过度自信的纳税人选择——或至少受到强烈影响——那么拉姆齐逆弹性规则本身的吸引力可能会被逆转。

34418.title: Optimal Dual-Regime Business Tax Systems
34418.authors: Rishi R. Sharma, Joel Slemrod, Michael Stimmelmayr, John D. Wilson, Peter Choi
34418.abstract: Dual-regime business tax systems typically subject smaller firms to an output (turnover) tax and larger firms to a profit (corporate) tax. Despite their prevalence, there is little formal analysis of their optimal design. This paper addresses this gap by developing a theoretical framework to analyze the optimal tax parameters and the relative performance of two types of dual-regime systems: threshold and minimum tax systems. We show that either type of dual regime system can yield lower social costs than a single regime system. Using parameter values from recent empirical studies, we also show that a generalized minimum tax system we propose would outperform other dual regime systems under most parameter values. These findings carry important policy implications, particularly as many countries currently employ either threshold or minimum tax systems, but none have yet implemented a generalized minimum tax.
34418.zh_abstract: 双轨制企业税制通常对较小企业征收产出（营业额）税，对较大企业征收利润（公司）税。尽管这种制度普遍存在，但对其最优设计的正式分析却很少。本文通过构建一个理论框架来弥补这一空白，分析最优税收参数以及两种双轨制系统——阈值税制和最低税制——的相对表现。我们表明，任何一种双轨制系统都能比单一税制系统产生更低的社会成本。利用近期实证研究的参数值，我们还表明，我们提出的一般化最低税制在大多数参数值下将优于其他双轨制系统。这些发现具有重要的政策含义，特别是考虑到许多国家目前采用阈值税制或最低税制，但尚未有国家实施一般化最低税制。

34417.title: Fraud at a Distance? How Remote Work Shapes Financial Misconduct
34417.zh_title: 远程欺诈？远程工作如何影响金融不当行为
34417.authors: John M. Barrios, Jessie Jianwen Guo, Yanping Zhu
34417.abstract: Financial misconduct is often a team activity, facilitated by face-to-face interactions, shared norms, and trust. We exploit the sudden shift to remote work during COVID-19 to examine how workplace organization shapes collusion and financial misconduct. Using a novel firm-level measure of work-from-home feasibility, we find that firms that are more able to operate remotely experienced large post-2020 declines in misconduct. This decline is found across multiple misreporting proxies and is robust to various alternative measures of remote work. Cross-sectional tests indicate stronger declines in teamwork-intensive firms, firms with effective internal controls, and firms with weaker pre-COVID employee perceptions of culture and leadership. Overall, our findings reflect that financial misconduct is a team activity, sensitive to the organizational structure of the firm, with important implications for governance and organizational design.
34417.zh_abstract: 金融不当行为通常是一种团队活动，由面对面互动、共享规范和信任所促成。我们利用COVID-19期间突然转向远程工作的变化，来考察工作场所组织如何影响合谋和金融不当行为。使用一种新颖的公司层面远程工作可行性衡量指标，我们发现，更能够远程运营的公司在2020年后经历了不当行为的显著下降。这种下降在多个虚假报告代理变量中均存在，并且对于远程工作的各种替代衡量指标都是稳健的。横截面检验表明，在团队合作密集型公司、内部控制有效的公司以及COVID前员工对文化和领导力感知较弱的公司中，下降更为显著。总体而言，我们的发现反映了金融不当行为是一种团队活动，对公司的组织结构敏感，对治理和组织设计具有重要影响。
34417.meta: Programs：CF, LE, LS, PR；JEL：D23, G30, G38, G39, J24, K22, M2, M4, M40, M41

34416.title: The International Monetary System in the Last and Next 20 Years Redux
34416.zh_title: 过去与未来20年的国际货币体系再探
34416.abstract: In a paper 20 years ago, we analyzed the evolution of the international monetary system over the preceding 20 years and projected its evolution 20 years into the future, on the assumption of unchanged transition probabilities. Here we compare those projections with outcomes and provide new projections, again 20 years into the future. Although the world as a whole has seen financial opening and movement away from intermediate exchange rate regimes, as projected, movement has been slower than projected on the basis of observed transition probabilities in the 20 years preceding our forecast. New projections again based on unchanged transition probabilities but allowing countries to shift between advanced, emerging and developing country groupings and reclassifying exchange rate regimes to accord with current practice again suggest that policy regimes will be modestly different in 2045 than today. There will be a continued decline in intermediate exchange rate arrangements, and gains for hard pegs, as emerging markets move in this direction, and for more freely floating rates, driven by developing countries. There will be a further increase in the share of countries with open capital accounts, driven by emerging markets and developing countries.
34416.zh_abstract: 在20年前的一篇论文中，我们分析了此前20年国际货币体系的演变，并在假设转移概率不变的情况下，预测了其未来20年的演变。在此，我们将这些预测与结果进行比较，并再次提供未来20年的新预测。尽管整个世界如预测般经历了金融开放和远离中间汇率制度，但基于我们预测前20年观察到的转移概率，实际变化速度慢于预测。基于不变转移概率但允许国家在发达、新兴和发展中国家组别之间移动，并根据当前实践重新分类汇率制度的新预测再次表明，2045年的政策制度将与今天略有不同。中间汇率安排将继续减少，硬盯住汇率将增加（由新兴市场推动），更自由浮动的汇率也将增加（由发展中国家推动）。由新兴市场和发展中国家推动，资本账户开放国家的比例将进一步上升。

34415.title: Ideology in Government: Evidence from the Office of Indian Affairs and the Assimilation Era
34415.zh_title: 政府中的意识形态：来自印第安事务局与同化时代的证据
34415.authors: Eric Chyn, Kareem Haggag, Christian Maruthiah
34415.abstract: This paper studies the ideology of government officials and coercive policymaking by examining the Office of Indian Affairs, an institution that held broad authority over the land, education, and legal governance of Indigenous populations in the United States. We digitize the detailed reports of the agency's bureaucrats and use computational tools to measure the strength of their support for assimilationist policies during the 19th and early 20th centuries. We document major shifts in ideological commitments that coincide with the entry—and eventual exit—of social reformers nominated for high-level agency positions by religious organizations. We find that ideology within the bureaucracy appears to moderate around the turn of the century despite the organization's overall continued pursuit of major assimilation policies, such as the promotion of farming and enrollment in off-reservation Indian boarding schools. To examine performance implications of ideology within the bureaucracy, we conclude with an analysis of policy implementation after the passage of the Dawes Act, a landmark law that aimed to dismantle collective land holdings. We provide evidence showing that the agencies with local staff who express greater past commitment to assimilationist goals carried out more land redistribution immediately after Dawes became law.
34415.zh_abstract: 本文通过研究印第安事务局（一个对美国原住民的土地、教育和法律治理拥有广泛权力的机构）来考察政府官员的意识形态与强制性政策制定。我们将该机构官僚的详细报告数字化，并使用计算工具来衡量他们在19世纪和20世纪初对同化主义政策的支持强度。我们记录了意识形态承诺的重大转变，这些转变与宗教组织提名担任高级机构职位的社会改革者的进入——以及最终退出——相吻合。我们发现，尽管该组织总体上继续推行主要的同化政策，例如推广农业和招收原住民进入保留地外的印第安寄宿学校，但官僚机构内部的意识形态似乎在世纪之交趋于温和。为了考察官僚机构内部意识形态对绩效的影响，我们最后分析了《道斯法案》（一项旨在瓦解集体土地所有权的里程碑式法律）通过后的政策实施情况。我们提供的证据表明，在《道斯法案》成为法律后，那些当地工作人员对同化主义目标表现出更强过往承诺的机构，执行了更多的土地重新分配。
34415.meta: Programs：DAE, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D73, J15, M5, N41

34414.title: Fast Action for Floods: RCT Evidence on Forecast-based Cash Transfers from Bangladesh and Nepal
34414.zh_title: 洪水快速行动：来自孟加拉国和尼泊尔基于预报的现金转移的随机对照试验证据
34414.authors: Paul J. Christian, Felipe A. Dunsch, Jonas Heirman, Erin M. Kelley, Florence Kondylis, Gregory Lane, Jennifer Waidler, Nidhila Adusumalli, Odbayar Batmunkh, Kriti Malhotra
34414.abstract: As increasingly frequent extreme weather events disrupt lives, institutions are turning to early-warning systems and advance preparation to accelerate aid delivery. We present evidence from a randomized controlled trial in Bangladesh and Nepal testing whether providing cash within days of a flood leads to greater benefits than delivering the same assistance months later—or if it simply shifts the timing of benefits without improving overall welfare. Results suggest that timely cash assistance leads to overall gains in food security and psychosocial well-being. This evidence supports efforts to forecast crises and release disaster relief quickly.
34414.zh_abstract: 随着日益频繁的极端天气事件扰乱人们的生活，各机构正转向早期预警系统和预先准备以加速援助交付。我们提供了来自孟加拉国和尼泊尔的一项随机对照试验的证据，该试验测试了在洪水发生数天内提供现金是否比数月后提供相同援助带来更大的益处——或者仅仅是改变了受益的时间而不改善整体福利。结果表明，及时的现金援助在粮食安全和心理健康方面带来了整体改善。这一证据支持了预测危机并迅速发放救灾物资的努力。

34468.title: The Coasean Singularity? Demand, Supply, and Market Design with AI Agents
34468.zh_title: 科斯奇点？人工智能代理的需求、供给与市场设计
34468.authors: Peyman Shahidi, Gili Rusak, Benjamin S. Manning, Andrey Fradkin, John J. Horton
34468.abstract: AI agents—autonomous systems that perceive, reason, and act on behalf of human principals—are poised to transform digital markets by dramatically reducing transaction costs. This chapter evaluates the economic implications of this transition, adopting a consumer-oriented view of agents as market participants that can search, negotiate, and transact directly. From the demand side, agent adoption reflects derived demand: users trade off decision quality against effort reduction, with outcomes mediated by agent capability and task context. On the supply side, firms will design, integrate, and monetize agents, with outcomes hinging on whether agents operate within or across platforms. At the market level, agents create efficiency gains from lower search, communication, and contracting costs, but also introduce frictions such as congestion and price obfuscation. By lowering the costs of preference elicitation, contract enforcement, and identity verification, agents expand the feasible set of market designs but also raise novel regulatory challenges. While the net welfare effects remain an empirical question, the rapid onset of AI-mediated transactions presents a unique opportunity for economic research to inform real-world policy and market design.
34468.zh_abstract: 人工智能代理——代表人类委托人进行感知、推理和行动的自主系统——有望通过大幅降低交易成本来改变数字市场。本章评估了这一转变的经济影响，采用以消费者为导向的视角，将代理视为能够直接搜索、谈判和交易的市场参与者。从需求侧看，代理的采用反映了派生需求：用户在决策质量与减少努力之间进行权衡，结果由代理能力和任务背景调节。在供给侧，企业将设计、整合代理并从中获利，结果取决于代理是在平台内还是跨平台运作。在市场层面，代理通过降低搜索、沟通和签约成本带来效率提升，但也引入了拥堵和价格混淆等摩擦。通过降低偏好揭示、合同执行和身份验证的成本，代理扩展了市场设计的可行集，但也引发了新的监管挑战。虽然净福利效应仍是一个实证问题，但人工智能中介交易的迅速兴起为经济研究提供了独特机会，以指导现实世界的政策和市场设计。
34468.meta: Programs：PR；JEL：D47, D83, J44, K20, L15, L86, O33

34467.title: Welfare Implications of Increased Retailer Participation in SNAP
34467.zh_title: 增加零售商参与补充营养援助计划的福利影响
34467.authors: Anne T. Byrne, Xiao Dong, Jessie Handbury, Erik James, Katherine Meckel, Andrés C. Rovira
34467.abstract: Governments often rely on private vendors to deliver in-kind benefits, yet little is known about how vendor participation affects markets and welfare. We study a sharp rise in retailer participation in the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) during the Great Recession, driven largely by non-grocer formats. Linking administrative, retail, and household data, we find that sales increased 6% and variety 4% at adopting stores, with no price effects and only modest spillovers to local competitors. A revealed-preference framework shows that, while consumers value adoption at some chains, overall welfare gains for SNAP households were modest-equivalent to a 1.8% reduction in travel costs-with little effect on non-SNAP households.
34467.zh_abstract: 政府通常依赖私营供应商提供实物福利，但关于供应商参与如何影响市场和福利，人们知之甚少。我们研究了在大衰退期间，补充营养援助计划（SNAP）中零售商参与率的急剧上升，这主要由非杂货店业态推动。通过关联行政、零售和家庭数据，我们发现，采用该计划的商店销售额增长了6%，品种增加了4%，没有价格效应，对当地竞争对手的溢出效应也较小。一个显示性偏好框架表明，虽然消费者重视某些连锁店的参与，但SNAP家庭的总体福利收益适中——相当于旅行成本降低1.8%——对非SNAP家庭几乎没有影响。
34467.meta: Programs：CH, IO, PE；JEL：D12, H53, I38, L81

34466.title: Is Video Watching Bad for Kids? The Effect of Video Watching on Children's Skills
34466.zh_title: 看视频对孩子有害吗？视频观看对儿童技能的影响
34466.authors: Carolina Caetano, Gregorio S. Caetano, Débora Mazetto, Meghan Skira
34466.abstract: This paper documents video consumption among school-aged children in the U.S. and explores its impact on human capital development. Video watching is common across all segments of society, yet surprisingly little is known about its developmental consequences. With a bunching identification strategy, we find that an additional hour of daily video consumption has a negative impact on children’s noncognitive skills, with harmful effects on both internalizing behaviors (e.g., depression) and externalizing behaviors (e.g., social difficulties). We find a positive effect on math skills, though the effect on an aggregate measure of cognitive skills is smaller and not statistically significant. These findings are robust and largely stable across most demographics and different ways of measuring skills and video watching. We find evidence that for Hispanic children, video watching has positive effects on both cognitive and noncognitive skills—potentially reflecting its role in supporting cultural assimilation. Interestingly, the marginal effects of video watching remain relatively stable regardless of how much time children spend on the activity, with similar incremental impacts observed among those who watch very little and those who watch for many hours.
34466.zh_abstract: 本文记录了美国学龄儿童的视频消费情况，并探讨了其对人力资本发展的影响。视频观看在社会各阶层都很普遍，但令人惊讶的是，对其发展后果知之甚少。通过一个聚集识别策略，我们发现，每天额外一小时的视频消费对儿童的非认知技能有负面影响，对内化行为（如抑郁）和外化行为（如社交困难）均有不利影响。我们发现对数学技能有积极影响，但对认知技能综合指标的影响较小且统计上不显著。这些发现是稳健的，并且在大多数人口统计特征以及衡量技能和视频观看的不同方式上基本稳定。我们发现，对于西班牙裔儿童，视频观看对认知和非认知技能都有积极影响——这可能反映了其在支持文化同化中的作用。有趣的是，无论儿童花多少时间在视频观看上，其边际效应都保持相对稳定，在观看时间很少和观看时间很长的儿童中观察到的增量影响相似。

34465.title: Does Public Health Insurance Cause Crowding Into Public Facilities and Informality? The Case of Seguro Popular
34465.zh_title: 公共医疗保险是否导致向公共设施拥挤和非正规就业？以大众保险为例
34465.authors: Janet Currie, Lucy G. Hackett, Fernanda Marquez-Padilla
34465.abstract: Many low and middle-income countries are working to expand health insurance to previously uncovered people by creating health insurance programs intended for low-income people who would otherwise lack insurance coverage. Two concerns have been raised about these programs. First, people may be “crowded out” of private facilities and into public ones, increasing public expense and possibly degrading care through crowding. Second, public insurance could encourage informality by reducing the gap in compensation between formal sector and informal sector workers. We examine these questions in the context of Mexico’s Seguro Popular (SP) using longitudinal administrative data on childbirth. We focus on women with more than one observed birth and ask how SP affects the choice of provider for those whose first observed birth was in a public hospital, a private hospital, or a separate system of hospitals serving formal sector workers. We also look at how SP affects the utilization of care and newborn health. Because SP enrollment is endogenous, we instrument it using the rollout of a second program, SMSXXI, that provided health care for young children and enrolled other family members in SP. We find that the expansion of SMSXXI increased SP coverage of pregnant women. This in turn led to a higher probability of delivering in a public hospital, especially among those who had previously delivered in a private hospital. We find little impact of SP enrollment on the utilization of care or newborn health, with the notable exception that women who previously delivered in a private hospital were more likely to start prenatal care in the first trimester when they switched to SP, indicating a greater willingness to seek preventive care when it is free.
34465.zh_abstract: 许多中低收入国家正致力于通过创建针对低收入人群的医疗保险计划来扩大医疗保险覆盖范围，这些人群原本没有保险。对这些计划提出了两个担忧。首先，人们可能被“挤出”私人设施而进入公共设施，增加公共支出并可能因拥挤而降低护理质量。其次，公共保险可能通过缩小正规部门与非正规部门工人之间的薪酬差距来鼓励非正规就业。我们在墨西哥大众保险（SP）的背景下，利用关于分娩的纵向行政数据来研究这些问题。我们重点关注有多次分娩记录的妇女，并询问SP如何影响那些首次分娩在公立医院、私立医院或为正规部门工人服务的独立医院系统的妇女的提供者选择。我们还考察了SP如何影响护理利用和新生儿健康。由于SP注册是内生的，我们使用第二个计划SMSXXI的推广作为工具变量，该计划为幼儿提供医疗保健并将其他家庭成员注册到SP。我们发现，SMSXXI的扩张增加了孕妇的SP覆盖率。这反过来又导致在公立医院分娩的可能性更高，尤其是在那些以前在私立医院分娩的妇女中。我们发现SP注册对护理利用或新生儿健康几乎没有影响，但有一个显著的例外：以前在私立医院分娩的妇女在转向SP后，更有可能在妊娠早期开始产前护理，这表明当预防性护理免费时，她们更愿意寻求。

34464.title: Affordable Housing During Childhood Improves Long-term Outcomes of Women and their Children
34464.zh_title: 童年时期的经济适用房改善女性和其子女的长期结果
34464.abstract: The Low Income Housing Tax Credit (LIHTC) Program is the largest federal affordable housing program in the U.S. Yet, little is known about its impacts on children and families. This paper shows how LIHTC exposure during childhood affects women’s health outcomes in early-adulthood, as well as the health of their infants. Using geocoded Florida Natality data for 1980-2024 and addresses for LIHTC units we study women born to mothers without any college education between 1980-1999. We use a matching model to compare women born into Census tracts that receive LIHTC during their childhoods to women born into Census tracts without LIHTC during their childhoods. These women and their infants are then observed in adulthood when they first give birth in Florida. We find that a standard deviation increase in childhood LIHTC exposure improves the maternal health index and the infant health index by a small but statistically significant 0.007 standard deviations, and improves an index of maternal SES by 0.005 standard deviations. Given that the average treated tract in our sample has only 0.023 LIHTC units per resident, there is considerable room for increasing exposure. LIHTC exposure during childhood improves outcomes the most for Black women, consistent with Black women being more likely to live in LIHTC units, and also more likely to live in Census tracts that receive LIHTC.
34464.zh_abstract: 低收入住房税收抵免（LIHTC）计划是美国最大的联邦经济适用房计划。然而，对其对儿童和家庭的影响知之甚少。本文展示了童年时期接触LIHTC如何影响女性成年早期的健康结果，以及其婴儿的健康状况。利用1980-2024年佛罗里达州的地理编码出生数据和LIHTC单元的地址，我们研究了1980-1999年间由未接受过大学教育的母亲所生的女性。我们使用匹配模型，将童年时期出生在接收LIHTC的人口普查区的女性与童年时期出生在未接收LIHTC的人口普查区的女性进行比较。这些女性和她们的婴儿随后在成年后首次在佛罗里达州分娩时被观察。我们发现，童年时期LIHTC接触量每增加一个标准差，孕产妇健康指数和婴儿健康指数会小幅但统计上显著地提高0.007个标准差，并使孕产妇社会经济地位指数提高0.005个标准差。鉴于我们样本中平均处理过的人口普查区每名居民仅有0.023个LIHTC单元，增加接触量的空间相当大。童年时期接触LIHTC对黑人女性的结果改善最大，这与黑人女性更有可能居住在LIHTC单元中，也更有可能居住在接收LIHTC的人口普查区中的情况一致。

34463.title: Path Dependence in the Labor Market: The Long-run Effects of Early Career Occupational Experience
34463.zh_title: 劳动力市场的路径依赖：早期职业生涯职业经历的长期影响
34463.authors: Jesse Bruhn, Jacob Fabian, Luke Gallagher, Matthew Gudgeon, Adam Isen, Aaron R. Phipps
34463.abstract: We study the causal effect of different early career occupational experiences on labor market outcomes. To do so, we pair over two decades of administrative tax data with internal personnel records from one of the largest employers of young adults in the United States: the US Army. Enlistees work in a diverse and varied set of occupations, including non-combat roles like mechanics, legal services, financial specialists, cooks, dental hygienists, police officers, and network/computer specialists. Occupational eligibility is determined by test score cutoffs which we leverage in a series of 35 regression discontinuity designs. We find that a typical early career occupational experience generates a substantial amount of path dependence, with point estimates that suggest a 19p.p. increase in the likelihood of being observed in an identical or closely related occupation as much as 20 years later. The corresponding impact of different occupations on earnings are highly heterogeneous, yet predictable: long-run changes in the average earnings of the occupations applicants are pushed into, and pulled out-of, can explain over 60% of the causal variation across cutoffs, with point estimates that suggest improvements in occupational earnings premia translate dollar-for-dollar into economic success. Taken together, our results highlight the importance of early career occupational experience as a key channel for promoting long-run well-being among young adults who are not college bound.
34463.zh_abstract: 我们研究了不同早期职业生涯职业经历对劳动力市场结果的因果效应。为此，我们将超过二十年的行政税收数据与美国最大的年轻成年人雇主之一——美国陆军——的内部人事记录配对。入伍者在多样且不同的职业中工作，包括非战斗角色，如机械师、法律服务、财务专家、厨师、牙科保健员、警察以及网络/计算机专家。职业资格由测试分数截止点决定，我们在35个断点回归设计中利用这一点。我们发现，典型的早期职业生涯职业经历会产生大量的路径依赖，点估计表明，在长达20年后，被观察到从事相同或密切相关职业的可能性增加了19个百分点。不同职业对收入的相应影响高度异质，但可预测：申请人被推入和拉出的职业的平均收入的长期变化可以解释跨截止点因果变异的60%以上，点估计表明职业收入溢价的改善会一对一地转化为经济成功。总之，我们的结果强调了早期职业生涯职业经历作为促进非大学背景年轻成年人长期福祉的关键渠道的重要性。
34463.meta: Programs：LS；JEL：J20, J24, J3, J38, J4, J45

34462.title: The Implications of Sorting for Immigrant Wage Assimilation and Changing Cohort Quality in Canada
34462.zh_title: 分类对加拿大移民工资同化与队列质量变化的影响
34462.abstract: Immigrant integration is a central issue in policy debates, with wage assimilation serving as a key indicator of immigrants’ economic success. Using matched employer–employee data from Canada, we study how access to higher-paying firms affects the economic assimilation of immigrants. Immigrants are disproportionately concentrated in lower-paying firms, accounting for much of the observed inequality. Nearly half of this sorting occurs across industries, and both firm- and industry-level wage gaps stagnate after eight years, suggesting that further assimilation reflects human capital accumulation rather than improved firm access. Importantly, these disparities persist after controlling for estimates of worker skill, indicating barriers to high-paying firms rather than differences in human capital. The analysis further shows that Canada’s post-2015 immigration policy reforms significantly improved immigrant outcomes: the initial wage gap narrowed by 25–35%, with roughly half of the improvement attributable to better allocation into higher-paying firms. Taken together, the findings highlight the critical role of firm sorting and its interaction with immigration policy in shaping the economic integration of immigrants.
34462.zh_abstract: 移民融合是政策辩论中的核心问题，工资同化是衡量移民经济成功的关键指标。利用加拿大匹配的雇主-雇员数据，我们研究了进入高薪企业如何影响移民的经济同化。移民不成比例地集中在低薪企业，这解释了观察到的很大一部分不平等。这种分类近一半发生在行业间，企业和行业层面的工资差距在八年后停滞不前，表明进一步的同化反映了人力资本积累，而非企业准入的改善。重要的是，在控制工人技能估计值后，这些差距仍然存在，表明存在进入高薪企业的障碍，而非人力资本差异。分析进一步表明，加拿大2015年后的移民政策改革显著改善了移民结果：初始工资差距缩小了25-35%，其中约一半的改善归因于更好地分配到高薪企业。总之，研究结果强调了企业分类及其与移民政策的相互作用在塑造移民经济融合中的关键作用。

34461.title: The Mortgage Debt Channel of Monetary Policy when Mortgages are Liquid
34461.zh_title: 抵押贷款流动性条件下的货币政策抵押贷款债务渠道
34461.authors: Matthew Elias, Christian Gillitzer, Greg Kaplan, Gianni La Cava, Nalini V. Prasad
34461.abstract: We examine what is widely considered to be one of the strongest channels of monetary policy transmission into household spending – the effect of changes in mortgage payments when mortgage rates are linked to the short-term policy rate. Using bank transactions data from Australia, we analyze a cumulative 425 basis point increase in the central bank policy rate, which caused mortgage repayments for homeowners with adjustable-rate mortgages to increase by $\$13,800$. We find little change in the spending of adjustable-rate mortgagors relative to fixed rate mortgagors. This is because adjustable-rate mortgages come with redraw facilities that make mortgages liquid, and households had large excess buffers due to pandemic-era transfer programs and restrictions on spending. Our findings demonstrate that the direct effects of a monetary policy tightening on household spending need not be large.
34461.zh_abstract: 我们研究了被广泛认为是货币政策传导至家庭支出最强渠道之一——当抵押贷款利率与短期政策利率挂钩时，抵押贷款还款变化的影响。利用澳大利亚的银行交易数据，我们分析了央行政策利率累计上调425个基点的情况，这导致浮动利率抵押贷款持有者的抵押贷款还款额增加了13,800美元。我们发现，与固定利率抵押贷款持有者相比，浮动利率抵押贷款持有者的支出变化很小。这是因为浮动利率抵押贷款附带再提取功能，使抵押贷款具有流动性，并且由于疫情时期的转移支付计划和支出限制，家庭拥有大量超额缓冲。我们的研究结果表明，货币政策紧缩对家庭支出的直接影响不一定很大。

34460.title: Optimizing Retirement Financial Strategies: Integrating Annuities, Defined Contribution Plans, and Long-Term Care Costs
34460.zh_title: 优化退休财务策略：整合年金、固定缴款计划与长期护理成本
34460.authors: Vanya Horneff, Raimond Maurer, Olivia S. Mitchell, Julius Odenbreit
34460.abstract: Nursing home costs in the United States now exceed $\$100,000$ per year, and government assistance programs such as Medicaid help out only when retirees are largely destitute. Moreover, health shocks driving the need for such care can arise suddenly in old age, are frequently permanent in nature, and can be associated with declining mental and physical abilities. These facts raise the important question of how households can best prepare to finance this final phase of life. Building on past research, we determine how retirees should manage payouts from defined contribution plans to balance trade-offs between consumption and health care cost shocks, using both retirement plan assets and annuitization. Our analysis explicitly integrates the role of taxes, required minimum distributions, bequest motives, and the possibility of retiree insolvency. We conclude that payout annuities, especially deferred and variable annuities, can be quite valuable for retirees, even when they face health shocks in later life.
34460.zh_abstract: 美国养老院护理成本现已超过每年10万美元，而医疗补助等政府援助计划仅在退休人员几乎身无分文时提供帮助。此外，导致此类护理需求的健康冲击可能在老年时突然出现，通常具有永久性，并可能与身心能力下降相关。这些事实提出了一个重要问题：家庭如何最好地准备为生命的最后阶段提供资金。在以往研究的基础上，我们确定了退休人员应如何管理固定缴款计划的支出，以平衡消费与医疗成本冲击之间的权衡，同时利用退休计划资产和年金化。我们的分析明确整合了税收、最低分配要求、遗赠动机以及退休人员破产可能性的作用。我们得出结论，即使退休人员在晚年面临健康冲击，支付年金，尤其是递延年金和可变年金，对他们来说也相当有价值。

34459.title: The Economic Impact of Brexit
34459.authors: Nicholas Bloom, Philip Bunn, Paul Mizen, Pawel Smietanka, Gregory Thwaites, Sasha Abrahams
34459.abstract: This paper examines the impact of the UK's decision to leave the European Union (Brexit) in 2016. Using almost a decade of data since the referendum, we combine simulations based on macro data with estimates derived from micro data collected through our Decision Maker Panel survey. These estimates suggest that by 2025, Brexit had reduced UK GDP by 6% to 8%, with the impact accumulating gradually over time. We estimate that investment was reduced by between 12% and 18%, employment by 3% to 4% and productivity by 3% to 4%. These large negative impacts reflect a combination of elevated uncertainty, reduced demand, diverted management time, and increased misallocation of resources from a protracted Brexit process. Comparing these with contemporary forecasts – providing a rare macro example to complement the burgeoning micro-literature of social science predictions – shows that these forecasts were accurate over a 5-year horizon, but they underestimated the impact over a decade.
34459.zh_abstract: 本文考察了英国2016年决定脱离欧盟（英国脱欧）的影响。利用公投后近十年的数据，我们将基于宏观数据的模拟与通过我们的决策者小组调查收集的微观数据估计相结合。这些估计表明，到2025年，英国脱欧使英国GDP减少了6%至8%，其影响随时间逐渐累积。我们估计，投资减少了12%至18%，就业减少了3%至4%，生产率下降了3%至4%。这些巨大的负面影响反映了不确定性上升、需求减少、管理层时间被占用以及长期脱欧过程导致资源错配加剧的综合作用。将这些结果与当时的预测进行比较——这提供了一个罕见的宏观案例，以补充新兴的社会科学预测微观文献——表明这些预测在五年期内是准确的，但它们低估了十年期的影响。

34458.title: Restrictive Marriage Migration Policies and Family Outcomes
34458.zh_title: 限制性婚姻移民政策与家庭结果
34458.abstract: As cross-border marriages rise, many governments have tightened rules on who can marry across borders, often in the name of promoting integration. Cross-border couples tend to have high divorce rates, which hinders successful assimilation. This paper provides the first evidence on how restrictive marriage migration policies affect family outcomes of migrants. We exploit a 2014 reform in South Korea that introduced pre-entry requirements for marriage visas, with language proficiency as the key component. Using rich administrative and survey data, we show that the reform led to a sharp temporary decline in cross-border marriages, improved migrants’ language skills, and increased educational attainment among both migrants and their Korean spouses. Comparing marriage cohorts immediately before and after the reform cutoff date, we find that cumulative divorce rates fell by 37% in the first 12 months and by 12% in the first 48 months, primarily due to language-based selection rather than demographic factors. Our evidence indicates that improved communication enhanced marital surplus and highlights the potential positive impact of selective admission policies that target civil and cultural assimilation.
34458.zh_abstract: 随着跨境婚姻的增加，许多政府收紧了跨境婚姻的规定，通常以促进融合为名。跨境夫妇的离婚率往往较高，这阻碍了成功的同化。本文首次提供了限制性婚姻移民政策如何影响移民家庭结果的证据。我们利用了韩国2014年的一项改革，该改革引入了婚姻签证的入境前要求，语言能力是其中的关键组成部分。利用丰富的行政和调查数据，我们表明该改革导致跨境婚姻急剧暂时下降，提高了移民的语言技能，并增加了移民及其韩国配偶双方的教育程度。比较改革截止日期前后立即结婚的群体，我们发现累计离婚率在头12个月内下降了37%，在头48个月内下降了12%，这主要是由于基于语言的选择而非人口因素。我们的证据表明，改善的沟通增加了婚姻剩余，并突显了针对公民和文化融合的选择性准入政策的潜在积极影响。

34457.title: Branching Out: Capital Mobility and Long-Run Growth
34457.zh_title: 向外拓展：资本流动性与长期增长
34457.abstract: We study the long-run effects of the first wave of U.S. banking market integration on capital mobility and manufacturing productivity. Using newly digitized bank and branch balance sheet data matched to state and county panels, we provide direct evidence that branching produced lasting productivity gains without aggregate capital deepening by leveraging internal capital markets to improve the geographic allocation of capital. Our novel ``deposit market access'' measure shows that bank funding grew most in capital-constrained counties within branching states. Both market access and border discontinuity designs indicate that branching’s organizational structure reduced capital allocation frictions to generate persistent growth.
34457.zh_abstract: 我们研究了美国银行业市场整合第一波浪潮对资本流动性和制造业生产率的长期影响。利用新数字化的银行和分行资产负债表数据，并与州和县面板数据匹配，我们提供了直接证据，表明分行制通过利用内部资本市场改善资本的地理配置，在不导致总体资本深化的前提下产生了持久的生产率提升。我们新颖的“存款市场准入”指标显示，在实行分行制的州内，资本受限县的银行资金增长最多。市场准入和边界不连续性设计均表明，分行制的组织结构减少了资本配置摩擦，从而产生了持续增长。
34457.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, EFG；JEL：G21, G28, N12, N22

34456.title: The Consequences of Faculty Sexual Misconduct
34456.zh_title: 教师性行为不端的后果
34456.authors: Sarah R. Cohodes, Katherine B. Leu
34456.abstract: Faculty sexual misconduct targeted at students is a widespread problem. The consequences of such incidents include direct harm to victims and may also entail a loss to science if students who encounter misconduct become discouraged from continuing their studies in their chosen field. We link publicly available information on degree completion by institution, academic field, and gender to a database of faculty sexual misconduct incidents verified in the media or court cases covering the years from 1983 to 2023. Then, we employ a stacked event study approach to document the extent to which publicly reported faculty sexual misconduct decreases in-field degree completion. Exposure to a field-specific faculty sexual misconduct public report decreases degree completion in that field by 4.7 percent four years after the incident. This decline is driven by reports occurring in 2015 and after, among which we observe a 7.9 percent decline in in-field degree completion. Students exit majors dominated by men, but this shift has little effect on predicted earnings because students shift away from both high- and low-earning majors.
34456.zh_abstract: 针对学生的教师性行为不端是一个普遍存在的问题。此类事件的后果包括对受害者的直接伤害，也可能导致科学损失，如果遭遇不端行为的学生因气馁而不再继续在其所选领域学习。我们将按机构、学术领域和性别划分的学位完成公开信息与1983年至2023年间经媒体或法庭案件核实的教师性行为不端事件数据库相关联。然后，我们采用堆叠事件研究方法，记录公开报道的教师性行为不端在多大程度上减少了领域内的学位完成。接触特定领域的教师性行为不端公开报告，会使该领域四年后的学位完成率下降4.7%。这种下降是由2015年及之后发生的报告驱动的，在这些报告中，我们观察到领域内学位完成率下降了7.9%。学生退出男性主导的专业，但这种转变对预测收入影响甚微，因为学生从高收入和低收入专业中都有转移。

34455.title: Then and Now: A Look Back and Ahead at the Federal Budget
34455.zh_title: 今昔对比：回顾与展望联邦预算
34455.abstract: It is well-understood that the U.S. faces an unsustainable fiscal future. We review historical budget trends and basic fiscal processes. We provide new estimates of the budget outlook, incorporating the recently enacted One Big Beautiful Bill Act (OBBBA), and finding that the debt-GDP ratio will rise to 183% in 2054 under the OBBBA as legislated and to 199% if the temporary tax and spending provisions are made permanent. These figures compare to a current debt-GDP ratio of about 100% and a pre-OBBBA CBO analysis earlier this year that projected the 2054 debt-GDP ratio to be 154%. We estimate a fiscal gap – the permanent tax or spending changes needed to keep the 2054 debt-GDP ratio at its current level – to be about 3.4% of GDP if OBBBA is extended. We discuss the economic and political ramifications of debt and different ways to address the fiscal situation.
34455.zh_abstract: 众所周知，美国面临着不可持续的财政未来。我们回顾了历史预算趋势和基本财政过程。我们提供了预算前景的新估计，纳入了最近颁布的《一项大而美丽的法案》（OBBBA），发现根据立法通过的OBBBA，债务-GDP比率将在2054年升至183%，如果临时税收和支出条款永久化，则升至199%。这些数字与当前约100%的债务-GDP比率以及今年早些时候国会预算办公室（CBO）预测2054年债务-GDP比率为154%的分析形成对比。我们估计，如果OBBBA延期，将债务-GDP比率维持在2054年当前水平所需的永久性税收或支出变化（即财政缺口）约为GDP的3.4%。我们讨论了债务的经济和政治影响，以及解决财政状况的不同方式。

34454.title: Does Regulation Distort Exit Decisions? Evidence from U.S. Power Plants
34454.zh_title: 监管会扭曲退出决策吗？来自美国发电厂的证据
