34454.authors: Lucas W. Davis, Paige E. Weber
34454.abstract: Hundreds of power plants have closed in the United States since 2010, including 130+ gigawatts of coal and 50+ gigawatts of natural gas. In this paper, we highlight the potential for regulation to distort this type of exit decision. Using generator-level data from 2010–2023, we show that regulated units have been 45% less likely to exit than unregulated units. For unregulated units, exit decisions are made based on wholesale electricity prices, ongoing capital costs, and other traditional economic factors. In contrast, owners of regulated units are largely insulated from these factors and, in some cases, have a strong incentive to continue operating capital-intensive equipment. Previous work documents how this regulatory distortion affects investment decisions. Our paper emphasizes that these same incentives affect exit decisions as well.
34454.zh_abstract: 自2010年以来，美国已有数百座发电厂关闭，包括超过130吉瓦的燃煤电厂和超过50吉瓦的天然气电厂。在本文中，我们强调了监管可能扭曲此类退出决策的可能性。利用2010年至2023年的发电机级数据，我们表明受监管机组的退出可能性比未受监管机组低45%。对于未受监管机组，退出决策基于批发电价、持续资本成本和其他传统经济因素。相比之下，受监管机组的业主在很大程度上不受这些因素的影响，并且在某些情况下，有强烈的动机继续运营资本密集型设备。先前的研究记录了这种监管扭曲如何影响投资决策。我们的论文强调，这些相同的激励措施也影响退出决策。
34454.meta: Programs：EEE, IO；JEL：D24, L94, Q41, Q48, Q54

34453.title: Present Bias and Discount Rate Risk
34453.zh_title: 现时偏向与贴现率风险
34453.authors: Lars A. Lochstoer, Stig R. H. Lundeby, Zhaneta K. Tancheva
34453.abstract: Recent evidence in the psychology literature suggests that individuals' degree of present bias varies with the state of nature and increases under stress. Consistent with this notion, we document, using survey data on individuals’ expected and realized consumption growth, that agents indeed tend to overconsume relative to their expectations and that the degree of such overconsumption is higher in bad times. We analyze the asset pricing implications of this bias and show that even if they control a small fraction of wealth, investors with time-varying degree of present bias cause substantial, priced discount rate risks that have first-order impact on the level and time-variation of asset risk premiums. The mechanism is distinct from that of models with time-varying preference parameters and that of models with biased expectations about aggregate outcomes.
34453.zh_abstract: 心理学文献的最新证据表明，个体的现时偏向程度会随自然状态的变化而变化，并在压力下加剧。与此观点一致，我们利用关于个体预期和实际消费增长的调查数据记录到，代理人确实倾向于过度消费（相对于其预期），且这种过度消费的程度在经济不景气时更高。我们分析了这种偏误对资产定价的影响，并表明，即使只控制一小部分财富，具有时变现时偏向程度的投资者也会导致显著的、被定价的贴现率风险，这些风险对资产风险溢价水平及其时变性具有一阶影响。该机制不同于具有时变偏好参数的模型，也不同于对总体结果存在偏误预期的模型。

34452.title: The Effects of Immigration Enforcement on Student Outcomes in a New Era of Immigration Policy in the United States
34452.zh_title: 美国移民执法新时代对学生学业成果的影响
34452.abstract: This study presents the first evidence, to our knowledge, of the effects of the surge in interior immigration apprehensions in 2025 in the United States on student academic performance using detailed student-level administrative records from Florida. We find evidence that immigration enforcement reduced test scores for both U.S.-born and foreign-born Spanish-speaking students while also reducing the likelihood that these students are involved in disciplinary incidents in schools. Both of these effects are more pronounced for students in middle and high schools.
34452.zh_abstract: 本研究利用佛罗里达州详细的学生层面行政记录，首次提供了关于2025年美国境内移民逮捕激增对学生学业成绩影响的证据。我们发现，移民执法降低了美国出生和外国出生的西班牙语学生的考试成绩，同时也降低了这些学生卷入学校纪律事件的可能性。这两种效应在初中和高中学生中更为显著。

34451.title: People versus Places: Elite Persistence after the Fall of the Ming
34451.zh_title: 人还是地：明朝覆灭后的精英持续性
34451.abstract: We study how elite power persisted through the Ming–Qing transition in Central China. Using genealogical microdata on married couples and their descendants, linked to measures of local elite influence, we estimate the effects of the Ming collapse (1368–1644) on families (people) and on regions (places). A family line-level treatment and control approach shows that elites experienced an immediate loss of influence, but their descendants recovered and consolidated elite status under the Qing (1644–1911). In contrast, a region-level design indicates that areas more heavily exposed to Ming-collapse destruction suffered persistent adverse outcomes. Evidence on career choice is consistent with a trauma-induced shift toward civil service examination careers, with stronger intergenerational transmission of exam-oriented norms in families more exposed to destruction. The results document adaptive persistence of elite families despite regime change, alongside lasting regional scarring, and highlight the role of cultural transmission in the persistence of elite status.
34451.zh_abstract: 我们研究了精英权力如何在中国中部的明清更替中持续存在。利用关于已婚夫妇及其后代的族谱微观数据，并结合地方精英影响力的衡量指标，我们估算了明朝覆灭（1368-1644）对家族（人）和区域（地）的影响。一个家族谱系层面的处理与对照方法表明，精英们经历了影响力的即时丧失，但其后代在清朝（1644-1911）下恢复并巩固了精英地位。相比之下，一个区域层面的设计表明，受明朝覆灭破坏更严重的地区遭受了持续的不利后果。关于职业选择的证据与一种创伤引发的向科举职业转变相一致，并且在遭受破坏更多的家族中，以考试为导向的规范存在更强的代际传递。结果记录了尽管政权更迭，精英家族仍具有适应性的持续性，同时伴随着持久的区域创伤，并强调了文化传递在精英地位持续性中的作用。

34450.title: Demand Elasticity in Dynamic Asset Pricing
34450.zh_title: 动态资产定价中的需求弹性
34450.authors: Zhiguo He, Péter Kondor, Jessica S. Li
34450.abstract: Standard demand elasticity estimation treats investors' demand slopes as stable objects that can be traced out by exogenous residual supply shifts. We show this identification strategy fails in dynamic settings: supply shocks cause demand curves to tilt and shift through general equilibrium effects. The mechanism is intuitive—investors' demand depends on the entire distribution of current and future returns, including volatility, covariances, and correlations with investment opportunities. Supply shocks that change today's prices inevitably reshape future return distributions, moving the demand curve itself. We develop and calibrate a dynamic model to quantify this mismeasurement. The measured slope is approximately 40% of its conceptual counterpart, implying that demand curves are substantially steeper than estimated. This distortion operates through two channels: endogenous risk (altered volatility and covariances) and amplified intertemporal hedging (changed correlation with investment opportunities). The distortion remains sizable even for infinitesimal or purely transitory shocks.
34450.zh_abstract: 标准的需求弹性估计将投资者的需求斜率视为稳定的对象，可以通过外生的剩余供给变动来刻画。我们表明这种识别策略在动态设定中失效：供给冲击通过一般均衡效应导致需求曲线倾斜和移动。该机制是直观的——投资者的需求取决于当前和未来回报的整个分布，包括波动率、协方差以及与投资机会的相关性。改变当前价格的供给冲击不可避免地重塑了未来的回报分布，从而移动了需求曲线本身。我们开发并校准了一个动态模型来量化这种测量误差。测得的斜率大约是其概念对应物的40%，这意味着需求曲线比估计的要陡峭得多。这种扭曲通过两个渠道运作：内生风险（改变的波动率和协方差）和放大的跨期对冲（改变与投资机会的相关性）。即使对于无穷小或纯粹暂时的冲击，这种扭曲仍然显著。
34450.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IO, ME；JEL：D50, E10, G10, G11

34449.title: From Asia, With Skills
34449.abstract: This paper examines the rise of high-skill migration from Asia to the United States over the past three decades and its consequences for both sending and receiving economies. Between 1990 and 2019, migrants from five Asian countries—India, China, South Korea, Japan, and the Philippines—accounted for over one-third of the growth in US software developers and a quarter of the increase in scientists, engineers, and physicians. Drawing on census microdata, visa records, and administrative sources, I show how US demand for talent in information technology, higher education, and healthcare interacted with Asia’s demographic and educational transformations to generate this migration boom. Policy reforms (notably the H-1B, F-1, and J-1 visa programs) and sectoral shifts—such as the internet revolution, declining public support for universities, and aging-related healthcare demand—created persistent needs for foreign students and workers. Asian economies were uniquely positioned to meet this demand through rapid tertiary expansion, strong STEM institutions, English proficiency, and diaspora networks. These inflows boosted US innovation, entrepreneurship, and service-sector productivity while fostering “brain gain” and “brain circulation” in Asia. Together, these trends reveal how talent flows from Asia have become central to the structure and growth of the modern US economy.
34449.zh_abstract: 本文考察了过去三十年间从亚洲到美国的高技能移民的兴起及其对输出和接收经济体的影响。在1990年至2019年间，来自五个亚洲国家——印度、中国、韩国、日本和菲律宾——的移民占美国软件开发人员增长的三分之一以上，以及科学家、工程师和医生增长的四分之一。利用人口普查微观数据、签证记录和行政来源，我展示了美国对信息技术、高等教育和医疗保健领域人才的需求如何与亚洲的人口和教育变革相互作用，从而引发了这场移民热潮。政策改革（特别是H-1B、F-1和J-1签证项目）以及部门性转变——例如互联网革命、对大学公共支持的减少以及与老龄化相关的医疗保健需求——创造了对外国学生和工人的持续需求。亚洲经济体通过快速的高等教育扩张、强大的STEM机构、英语熟练度和侨民网络，处于满足这一需求的独特位置。这些流入促进了美国的创新、创业和服务业生产率，同时在亚洲催生了“人才流入”和“人才循环”。这些趋势共同揭示了来自亚洲的人才流动如何成为现代美国经济结构和增长的核心。
34449.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, LS, PR；JEL：J24, J60, O34

34448.title: Probability Pricing
34448.authors: Eduardo Dávila, Cecilia Parlatore, Ansgar Walther
34448.abstract: This paper develops probability pricing, extending cash flow pricing to quantify the willingness-to-pay for changes in probabilities. We show that the value of any marginal change in probabilities can be expressed as a standard asset-pricing formula with hypothetical cash flows derived from changes in the survival function. This equivalence between probability and cash flow valuation allows us to construct hedging strategies and systematically decompose individual and aggregate willingness-to-pay. Four applications examine the valuation of changes in the distribution of aggregate consumption, the efficiency effects of varying performance precision in principal-agent problems, and the welfare implications of public and private information.
34448.zh_abstract: 本文发展了概率定价，将现金流定价扩展为量化对概率变化的支付意愿。我们表明，任何边际概率变化的价值都可以表示为一个标准的资产定价公式，其中包含从生存函数变化中推导出的假设性现金流。这种概率估值与现金流估值之间的等价性使我们能够构建对冲策略，并系统地分解个体和总体的支付意愿。四个应用分别考察了总消费分布变化的价值评估、委托代理问题中绩效精度变化的效率效应，以及公共和私人信息的福利含义。

34447.title: The Roots of the Modern American Presidential Campaign
34447.zh_title: 现代美国总统竞选活动的根源
34447.abstract: Campaign tours have become an essential component of U.S. presidential elections. How and when did they begin? We explore the early history of in-person political campaigning in the United States by reconstructing the first presidential campaign tours from historical newspaper clippings. We analyze the decision to campaign, the determinants of where candidates campaigned, and the outcomes of early in-person campaigns. We document an evolving norm of campaigning. This norm evolved well after the expansion of the railroad network. While a national railroad network was a necessary precondition for campaigning to evolve, our findings point to other factors – such as growing urbanization and the decline of federal patronage machines – playing a more important role in the growth of campaigning. We find evidence that being visited on a campaign tour increased voter turnout in a county. However, we do not find a clear effect of campaign visits of a given candidate on his electoral performance.
34447.zh_abstract: 竞选巡回演讲已成为美国总统选举的重要组成部分。它们是如何以及何时开始的？我们通过从历史报纸剪报中重建首次总统竞选巡回演讲，探讨了美国面对面政治竞选的早期历史。我们分析了竞选决策、候选人选择竞选地点的决定因素，以及早期面对面竞选的结果。我们记录了一种不断演变的竞选规范。这种规范是在铁路网络扩张之后很久才演变的。虽然全国性的铁路网络是竞选活动演变的必要前提，但我们的发现指向其他因素——例如日益增长的城市化和联邦赞助机器的衰落——在竞选活动的增长中发挥了更重要的作用。我们发现，一个县被竞选巡回演讲访问会增加选民投票率。然而，我们没有发现特定候选人的竞选访问对其选举表现有明确的影响。

34446.title: Investor Beliefs and Expectation Formation
34446.zh_title: 投资者信念与预期形成
34446.authors: Stefano Giglio, Matteo Maggiori, Joachim Rillo, Johannes Stroebel, Stephen P. Utkus, Xiao Xu
34446.abstract: This article reviews the literature that uses survey data to study expectation formation among investors. We begin by outlining methods for eliciting investor beliefs and summarizing key empirical patterns documented in recent work. Highlighting the persistent cross-sectional heterogeneity in expectations, we then review evidence on the determinants of beliefs, including a new analysis of belief reactions to the tariff announcement in April 2025. Next, we examine how expectations shape financial decision-making, emphasizing the systematic but muted sensitivity of outcomes to belief changes. We conclude by pointing to promising directions for future research on belief measurement, the determinants of expectations, and their implications for policymakers.
34446.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了利用调查数据研究投资者预期形成的文献。我们首先概述了引出投资者信念的方法，并总结了近期工作中记录的关键实证模式。在强调预期中持续的横截面异质性后，我们接着回顾了关于信念决定因素的证据，包括对2025年4月关税公告后信念反应的新分析。接下来，我们考察了预期如何塑造金融决策，强调了结果对信念变化的系统性但微弱的敏感性。最后，我们指出了关于信念测量、预期决定因素及其对政策制定者含义的未来研究的有前景方向。

34445.title: Minimum Wages and Informality
34445.zh_title: 最低工资与非正规就业
34445.authors: Ellora Derenoncourt, François Gerard, Lorenzo Lagos, Claire Montialoux
34445.abstract: How do minimum wages affect informality? We study the near-doubling of the real minimum wage from 2000 to 2009 in Brazil, where 46% of the workforce is informal. Using labor force surveys covering the informal sector, we show the minimum wage exhibits near full passthrough to informal employees working in formal firms, about half of all informal employees. The formal-to-informal reallocation elasticity with respect to the formal-wage is small: -0.28. Our findings illustrate how minimum wages can positively affect living standards for workers thought beyond the reach of labor law, a sizable share of the workforce in developing economies.
34445.zh_abstract: 最低工资如何影响非正规就业？我们研究了巴西2000年至2009年实际最低工资近乎翻倍的情况，当时该国46%的劳动力处于非正规就业状态。利用覆盖非正规部门的劳动力调查数据，我们发现最低工资几乎完全传导至在正规企业工作的非正规雇员——这类雇员约占所有非正规雇员的一半。正规就业向非正规就业的再分配弹性相对于正规工资而言较小，为-0.28。我们的研究结果说明了最低工资如何能够积极改善那些被认为超出劳动法覆盖范围的工人的生活水平，这些工人在发展中经济体的劳动力中占有相当大的比例。

34444.title: Artificial Intelligence, Competition, and Welfare
34444.abstract: We propose a policy-relevant research agenda examining how market power in up-stream artificial intelligence (AI) affects downstream prices, industry structure, factor returns, and welfare—especially whether labor-displacing AI leaves workers worse off. In our open-economy general equilibrium model, AI is a priced, imported input. Our main model features two nontraded sectors and firms making discrete adoption decisions about technology. Adoption reduces unit costs, displaces some types of workers, and depresses wages for those workers via diminishing returns elsewhere, while leaking AI fees abroad. We identify conditions under which market power in AI leads to a “double harm” for displaced workers, who may experience real wages cuts when AI becomes available at low prices, and then experience further harm from increases in AI prices. Strategic AI pricing reduces welfare by raising downstream marginal costs (via usage fees) and limiting entry and variety (via access fees). We derive an adoption frontier linking feasible usage fees to displaced workers’ outside options, showing that a monopolist typically makes use of both types of fees and prices on the frontier; capping one fee shifts rents to the other. Regulating both fees, alongside policies that absorb displaced labor, can raise national welfare.
34444.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一项具有政策相关性的研究议程，考察上游人工智能（AI）市场势力如何影响下游价格、产业结构、要素回报和福利——特别是劳动力替代型AI是否会使工人境况恶化。在我们的开放经济一般均衡模型中，AI是一种有定价的进口投入品。我们的主要模型包含两个非贸易部门，企业就技术采用做出离散决策。采用技术会降低单位成本，替代某些类型的工人，并通过其他部门的边际收益递减压低这些工人的工资，同时将AI费用转移至国外。我们识别出AI市场势力导致被替代工人遭受“双重损害”的条件：当AI以低价可得时，这些工人可能经历实际工资削减，随后AI价格上涨又会带来进一步损害。战略性AI定价通过提高下游边际成本（通过使用费）和限制进入与品种（通过接入费）来降低福利。我们推导出一个采用前沿，将可行的使用费与被替代工人的外部选择联系起来，表明垄断者通常会在前沿上同时使用两种费用并定价；限制一种费用会将租金转移到另一种费用上。对两种费用进行监管，同时配合吸收被替代劳动力的政策，可以提高国民福利。

34443.title: Breaking Parity: Equilibrium Exchange Rates and Currency Premia
34443.zh_title: 打破平价：均衡汇率与货币溢价
34443.authors: Mai C. Dao, Pierre-Olivier Gourinchas, Oleg Itskhoki
34443.abstract: We offer a unifying empirical model of covered and uncovered currency premia, interest rates and spot and forward exchange rates, both in the cross section and time series of currencies. We find that the rich empirical patterns are in line with a partial equilibrium model of the currency market, where hedged and unhedged currency is supplied by intermediary banks subject to value-at-risk balance-sheet constraints, emphasizing the frictional nature of equilibrium currency premia and exchange rate dynamics. In the cross section, the excess supply of local-currency savings is the key determinant of low relative interest rates, negative covered and uncovered currency premia, cheap forward dollars; and vice versa. In the time series, covered currency premia change infrequently and in concert across currencies, driven by aggregate financial market conditions. In contrast, uncovered currency premia move frequently in response to currency-specific demand shocks, which we capture with the dynamics of net currency futures positions of dealer banks. Exchange rate depreciations in response to negative shifts in currency demand are followed by small persistent appreciations that generate predictable expected returns necessary to ensure intermediation of currency demand shocks, irrespective of their financial or macroeconomic origin. Changes in net futures positions of dealer banks account for most of the variation in the spot exchange rate for every currency.
34443.zh_abstract: 我们提供了一个统一的实证模型，涵盖套期保值和非套期保值的货币溢价、利率以及即期和远期汇率，既包括货币的横截面维度也包括时间序列维度。我们发现，丰富的实证模式与货币市场的局部均衡模型一致，在该模型中，套期保值和未套期保值的货币由面临风险价值资产负债表约束的中介银行提供，这强调了均衡货币溢价和汇率动态的摩擦性质。在横截面上，本币储蓄的超额供给是低相对利率、负的套期保值和非套期保值货币溢价以及廉价远期美元的关键决定因素；反之亦然。在时间序列上，套期保值货币溢价变化不频繁且跨货币协同变化，由总体金融市场状况驱动。相比之下，非套期保值货币溢价频繁变动，以响应特定货币的需求冲击，我们通过交易商银行净货币期货头寸的动态来捕捉这一点。汇率因货币需求负面冲击而贬值后，会跟随小幅的持续性升值，从而产生可预测的预期回报，这对于确保货币需求冲击的中介化是必要的，无论其源于金融还是宏观经济因素。交易商银行净期货头寸的变化解释了每种货币即期汇率的大部分变动。
34443.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ITI, ME；JEL：E4, F3, G12

34442.title: Motives and Constraints in the Implementation of Argentina’s 2017 Tax Reform
34442.zh_title: 阿根廷2017年税制改革的动机与约束
34442.abstract: This paper examines the motives, constraints, and sequencing behind Argentina’s 2017 tax reform, drawing on the authors’ direct involvement in its design and implementation. We document how a large inherited fiscal imbalance, a disinflation program that mechanically raised real pension spending under the pre-existing indexation rule, minority status in Congress, and limited administrative capacity jointly narrowed the feasible policy set. Within those constraints, the reform aimed to be near-revenue-neutral while rebalancing the system toward investment and employment: phasing down corporate rates with dividend taxation and inflation adjustment, reducing the labor wedge at the bottom via a per-worker deduction, rationalizing VAT and excises (including carbon and health-motivated taxes), and coordinating with provinces to cap and de-cascade the turnover tax (ISIB) through a Fiscal Consensus. We trace how coalition politics and sectoral vetoes reshaped the package, why forward guidance and escape clauses were embedded ex ante, and how the 2018 sudden stop, followed by policy reversals, limited the reform’s realized growth dividend. We draw four lessons: credibility is a fiscal instrument; provincial coordination beats technocratic perfection; discretionary levers invite rent-seeking; and targeting informality and compliance margins yields higher returns than blunt rate changes. The analysis offers a pragmatic template for tax reform under macroeconomic fragility, federal fragmentation, and state-capacity constraints.
34442.zh_abstract: 本文基于作者直接参与阿根廷2017年税制改革设计与实施的经验，考察了其动机、约束和顺序安排。我们记录了以下因素如何共同收窄了可行的政策集：庞大的历史财政失衡、在原有指数化规则下因反通胀计划而机械性增加的实际养老金支出、国会中的少数党地位以及有限的行政能力。在这些约束下，改革旨在接近收入中性，同时将体系向投资和就业再平衡：逐步降低企业税率并引入股息税和通胀调整，通过按工人扣除来降低低端劳动力的税收楔子，合理化增值税和消费税（包括碳税和健康动机税），并通过财政共识与各省协调以限制和去层级化流转税（ISIB）。我们追溯了联盟政治和部门否决权如何重塑了改革方案，为何前瞻性指引和免责条款被预先嵌入，以及2018年的突然停止和随后的政策逆转如何限制了改革实现的增长红利。我们得出四点教训：可信度是一种财政工具；省级协调优于技术官僚式的完美；自由裁量权杠杆会引发寻租；针对非正规就业和合规边际比粗暴的税率变动能带来更高回报。该分析为在宏观经济脆弱、联邦碎片化和国家能力约束下的税制改革提供了一个务实的模板。

34441.title: Leaving Money on the Dashboard: Price Dispersion and Search Frictions on Uber and Lyft
34441.zh_title: 留在仪表盘上的钱：Uber和Lyft上的价格离散与搜索摩擦
34441.authors: Jeffrey Fossett, Michael Luca, Yejia Xu
34441.abstract: We document price differences for identical trips on Uber and Lyft, based on an audit of the two platforms. While price dispersion exists in the market, device-level data show that only 16.1 percent of consumers opening one app also open the other. Our estimates suggest that the modest frictions involved in comparison shopping increase platforms’ gross booking volume by over $\$300$ million annually in New York City alone. While price-comparison engines could in principle reduce frictions, Uber’s API terms of use limit such services, reducing riders’ ability to price compare.
34441.zh_abstract: 我们基于对Uber和Lyft两个平台的审计，记录了相同行程的价格差异。虽然市场上存在价格离散，但设备级数据显示，只有16.1%的消费者在打开一个应用的同时也会打开另一个。我们的估计表明，比较购物所涉及的微小摩擦每年仅在纽约市就使平台的预订总额增加了超过3亿美元。虽然价格比较引擎原则上可以减少摩擦，但Uber的API使用条款限制了此类服务，从而降低了乘客进行价格比较的能力。
34441.meta: Programs：IO, LS, PE, PR；JEL：D0, D40, D80, D83

34440.title: Positioned at Extremes: Future Job Placements of Immigrant Students at U.S. Colleges
34440.zh_title: 处于两极：美国大学移民学生的未来工作安置
34440.authors: Francis M. Dillon, Sari Pekkala Kerr, William R. Kerr, Andrew J. Wang
34440.abstract: Immigrant students who attend U.S. colleges are disproportionately employed in either large firms—especially multinationals—or small firms and self-employment. Using linked Census and longitudinal employment data, we trace the jobs taken by college students in 2000 during the 2001-20 period and evaluate four mechanisms shaping sector and firm size placement: geographic clustering, degree specialization, firm capabilities/visas, and ethnic self-employment specialization. Degree fields predict large firm and MNE placement, while ethnic specialization explains small firm sorting. Immigrant students who remain in the U.S. earn more than their native peers, suggesting the segmentation reflects productive sorting rather than blocked opportunity.
34440.zh_abstract: 就读美国大学的移民学生不成比例地受雇于大型企业——尤其是跨国公司——或者小型企业和自雇职业。利用关联的人口普查和纵向就业数据，我们追踪了2000年的大学生在2001-20年期间所从事的工作，并评估了塑造部门和规模安置的四种机制：地理集聚、学位专业化、企业能力/签证以及族裔自雇专业化。学位领域预测了大型企业和跨国公司的安置，而族裔专业化则解释了小型企业的分类。留在美国的移民学生收入高于其本土同龄人，这表明这种分化反映了生产性的分类而非机会受阻。
34440.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PR；JEL：F22, F23, F66, I23, J61, L26, M13, M16

34488.title: Social Dynamics of AI Adoption
34488.zh_title: 人工智能采纳的社会动态
34488.authors: Leonardo Bursztyn, Alex Imas, Rafael Jiménez-Durán, Aaron Leonard, Christopher Roth
34488.abstract: Anxiety about falling behind can drive people to embrace emerging technologies with uncertain consequences. We study how social forces shape demand for AI-based learning tools early in the education pipeline. In incentivized experiments with parents—key gatekeepers for children’s AI adoption—we elicit their demand for unrestricted AI tools for teenagers’ education. Parental demand rises with the share of other teenagers using the technology, with social forces increasing willingness to pay for AI by more than 60%. Providing information about potentially adverse effects of unstructured AI use negatively shifts beliefs about the merits of AI, but does not change individual demand. Instead, this information increases parents’ preference for banning AI in schools. Follow-up experiments show that social information has little effect on beliefs about AI quality, perceived skill priorities, or support for bans, suggesting that effects operate through social pressure rather than social learning. Our evidence highlights social pressure driving individual technology adoption despite widespread support for restricting its use.
34488.zh_abstract: 对落后的焦虑可能驱使人们接受后果不确定的新兴技术。我们研究社会力量如何塑造教育早期阶段对基于人工智能的学习工具的需求。在与家长（儿童采用人工智能的关键守门人）进行的激励实验中，我们引出了他们对青少年教育中不受限制的人工智能工具的需求。家长的需求随着使用该技术的其他青少年比例上升而增加，社会力量使对人工智能的支付意愿提高了60%以上。提供关于无结构人工智能使用潜在不利影响的信息会负面地改变对人工智能优点的信念，但不会改变个人需求。相反，这些信息增加了家长支持在学校禁止人工智能的偏好。后续实验表明，社会信息对关于人工智能质量的信念、感知的技能优先级或对禁令的支持几乎没有影响，这表明其效应是通过社会压力而非社会学习起作用的。我们的证据突显了社会压力推动个人技术采纳，尽管普遍支持限制其使用。

34487.title: A Cold Stop: Temperature, Unemployment and Joblessness Dynamics
34487.zh_title: 寒流：温度、失业与失业动态
34487.authors: Joshua S. Graff Zivin, Anthony Lepinteur, Matthew J. Neidell, Adrian Nieto Castro
34487.abstract: We provide new evidence that short-run temperature shocks affect unemployment dynamics. Linking daily weather data with three decades of Current Population Survey microdata, we show that cold, but not hot, temperatures significantly increase unemployment risk. This effect is concentrated in climate-exposed industries and driven by both increased job separations and longer unemployment durations. Separations appear to be driven by a rise in layoffs rather than quits, while the increase in unemployment duration is largely explained by a decline in employer vacancy postings. Taken together, temperature-induced joblessness dynamics are primarily demand-driven, rather than a result of changes in worker behavior.
34487.zh_abstract: 我们提供了短期温度冲击影响失业动态的新证据。将每日天气数据与三十年的当前人口调查微观数据相关联，我们表明寒冷（而非炎热）温度会显著增加失业风险。这种效应集中在受气候影响的行业，并且是由工作分离增加和失业持续时间延长共同驱动的。工作分离似乎是由裁员增加而非辞职增加所驱动，而失业持续时间的增加则很大程度上可以用雇主职位空缺发布减少来解释。综合来看，温度引发的失业动态主要是需求驱动的，而非工人行为变化的结果。

34486.title: Branching Fixed Effects: A Proposal for Communicating Uncertainty
34486.zh_title: 分支固定效应：关于沟通不确定性的一个提议
34486.abstract: Economists often rely on estimates of linear fixed effects models developed by other teams of researchers. Assessing the uncertainty in these estimates can be challenging. I propose a form of sample splitting for network data that breaks two-way fixed effects estimates into statistically independent branches, each of which provides an unbiased estimate of the parameters of interest. These branches facilitate uncertainty quantification, moment estimation, and shrinkage. Algorithms are developed for efficiently extracting branches from large datasets. I illustrate these techniques using a benchmark dataset from Veneto, Italy that has been widely used to study firm wage effects.
34486.zh_abstract: 经济学家经常依赖其他研究团队开发的线性固定效应模型的估计值。评估这些估计值的不确定性可能具有挑战性。我提出了一种针对网络数据的分割样本形式，它将双向固定效应估计分解为统计上独立的分支，每个分支都提供感兴趣参数的无偏估计。这些分支有助于不确定性量化、矩估计和收缩。我们开发了从大型数据集中高效提取分支的算法。我使用来自意大利威尼托的一个基准数据集来展示这些技术，该数据集已被广泛用于研究企业工资效应。

34485.title: The Impact of State Paid Sick Leave Mandates on Medicaid-financed Prescription Medications
34485.zh_title: 州级带薪病假强制令对医疗补助计划资助处方药的影响
34485.authors: Sumedha Gupta, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Christopher J. Ruhm, Kosali I. Simon
34485.abstract: The United States lacks a federal paid sick leave policy. However, 18 states and the District of Columbia have adopted or announced paid sick leave employer mandates to increase access to this benefit, creating a quasi-experimental setting to study whether paid sick leave affects healthcare use. People enrolled in Medicaid are an important population to study in terms of state paid sick leave policies as the majority of non-disabled enrollees are employed, but frequently work in jobs without paid sick leave. Given enrollees’ lower incomes, losing earnings to receive healthcare may be a significant barrier to care. In this study, we examine the effect of state paid sick leave policies on Medicaid-financed dispensed prescription medications. Using difference-in-differences methods that are robust to bias associated with a staggered treatment rollout, we show that Medicaid-financed dispensed prescription medications increase by 6.7% following adoption of a state paid sick leave policy. These findings suggest that state paid sick leave policies promote engagement with the healthcare system and use of healthcare services among financially constrained populations.
34485.zh_abstract: 美国缺乏联邦层面的带薪病假政策。然而，已有18个州和哥伦比亚特区通过或宣布了雇主带薪病假强制令，以增加员工获得此项福利的机会，这为研究带薪病假是否影响医疗保健利用创造了一个准实验环境。医疗补助计划参保者是一个值得研究的重要群体，因为大多数非残疾参保者有工作，但往往从事没有带薪病假的工作。考虑到参保者收入较低，因接受医疗而损失收入可能成为就医的重大障碍。在本研究中，我们考察了州级带薪病假政策对医疗补助计划资助的处方药配发量的影响。使用对交错政策推行带来的偏差具有稳健性的双重差分方法，我们发现，在州级带薪病假政策实施后，医疗补助计划资助的处方药配发量增加了6.7%。这些发现表明，州级带薪病假政策促进了经济受限人群参与医疗保健系统并利用医疗服务。
34485.meta: Programs：AG, CH, EH, LE, PE；JEL：H0, I1, K0

34484.title: Do Test Scores Misrepresent Test Results? An Item-by-Item Analysis
34484.zh_title: 考试成绩是否曲解了测试结果？一项逐题分析
34484.authors: Jesse Bruhn, Michael Gilraine, Jens Ludwig, Sendhil Mullainathan
34484.abstract: Much of the data collected in education is effectively thrown away. Students answer individual test questions, but administrators and researchers only see aggregate performance. All the item-level data are lost. Ex ante it is not clear this destroys much useful information, since the aggregate might be a sufficient statistic. Using data from Texas for 5 million students and 1.31 billion student-item responses, we show that in fact aggregation does destroy a great deal of valuable information in education: (1) Even conditional on a summary test measure, there is additional information in the item-level data; (2) This additional information is relevant for the student outcomes that education decisions seek to optimize; and (3) This information can be made practically useful for schools. Given how inexpensive storing, transmitting and analyzing such data would be, large gains could be had in education by simply using all the data we currently collect.
34484.zh_abstract: 教育领域收集的大部分数据实际上被浪费了。学生回答单个测试题目，但管理者和研究者只看到总体表现。所有逐题层面的数据都丢失了。事前并不清楚这是否会破坏大量有用信息，因为总体指标可能是一个充分统计量。利用德克萨斯州500万名学生和13.1亿个学生-题目回答的数据，我们表明，事实上汇总确实破坏了教育中大量有价值的信息：(1) 即使在控制了测试总分指标后，逐题数据中仍包含额外信息；(2) 这些额外信息与教育决策试图优化的学生结果相关；(3) 这些信息可以变得对学校实际有用。鉴于存储、传输和分析此类数据的成本非常低廉，仅通过充分利用我们当前收集的所有数据，教育领域就能获得巨大收益。

34483.title: Economic Development According to Chandler
34483.zh_title: 钱德勒视角下的经济发展
34483.authors: Niklas Engbom, Hannes Malmberg, Tommaso Porzio, Federico Rossi, Todd Schoellman
34483.abstract: Chandler (1977) shows that large firms require hierarchies of white-collar workers to coordinate complex production. We document that this insight continues to hold globally today, and we show that low education levels in developing countries limit the supply of white-collar workers and constrain firm size. We extend the occupational choice model of Lucas (1978) to allow entrepreneurs to reorganize their firms by allocating administrative tasks to hired professionals, which brings the firm closer to constant returns to scale. We calibrate the model to be consistent with cross-sectional microdata and validate it using quasi-experimental and experimental evidence on the effects of educational expansions and management training interventions. Skills explain two-thirds of the reorganization of production into large firms with economic development, while structural transformation and reductions in barriers are needed to explain the remaining shift.
34483.zh_abstract: 钱德勒（1977）指出，大企业需要白领工人的层级结构来协调复杂生产。我们记录了这一点在全球范围内至今仍然成立，并表明发展中国家较低的教育水平限制了白领工人的供给，从而制约了企业规模。我们扩展了卢卡斯（1978）的职业选择模型，允许企业家通过将行政任务分配给雇佣的专业人士来重组其企业，这使企业更接近规模报酬不变。我们校准模型以与横截面微观数据一致，并利用关于教育扩张和管理培训干预效果的准实验和实验证据进行验证。技能解释了随着经济发展生产重组为大企业的三分之二，而结构转型和壁垒减少则是解释剩余转变所必需的。

34482.title: Violent Peers at School: Impacts and Mechanisms
34482.zh_title: 校园中的暴力同伴：影响与机制
34482.abstract: This paper examines the impact of classroom exposure to peers with a history of violent behavior on academic achievement and the underlying mechanisms. This measure of peer violence departs significantly from earlier studies that measured potential peer violence based on the background characteristics of students. We exploit idiosyncratic treatment variations during the transition from primary to middle school for causal identification. We find that a higher proportion of violent peers negatively affects cognitive performance in tests in various subjects, particularly pronounced in mathematics and English, compared to Hebrew and science. These effects are more pronounced in girls than in boys. While boys’ performance is negatively influenced only by the presence of violent male peers, girls are adversely affected by both violent male and female peers. As for mechanisms, violent peers disrupt learning environments and lower teachers’ productivity, reflected in lower job satisfaction and perception of higher workloads. Violent peers also significantly increase the likelihood of other students engaging in physical fights, and reduce their homework time, especially for girls and students from low SES.
34482.zh_abstract: 本文研究了课堂上接触有暴力行为史的同学对学业成绩的影响及其潜在机制。这种同伴暴力的衡量方式与早期基于学生背景特征衡量潜在同伴暴力的研究有显著不同。我们利用小学升初中过渡期间的特殊处理变异进行因果识别。我们发现，暴力同伴比例较高会对各科测试的认知表现产生负面影响，与希伯来语和科学相比，在数学和英语上尤为明显。这些影响在女生中比在男生中更为显著。男生的表现仅受到暴力男性同伴存在的负面影响，而女生则同时受到暴力男性和女性同伴的不利影响。关于机制，暴力同伴会扰乱学习环境并降低教师生产力，这体现在教师工作满意度降低和感知工作量增加上。暴力同伴还显著增加了其他学生参与肢体冲突的可能性，并减少了他们的家庭作业时间，尤其是对女生和来自低社会经济地位家庭的学生而言。

34481.title: Occupations, Human Capital Accumulation and Inequality
34481.zh_title: 职业、人力资本积累与不平等
34481.authors: Andrés Erosa, Luisa Fuster, Gueorgui Kambourov, Richard Rogerson
34481.abstract: Two robust empirical facts are that mean wages and cross-sectional wage dispersion both increase over the life cycle. We study how these two changes vary across occupations and document a strong positive correlation: occupations with high mean wage growth over the life cycle also exhibit greater increases in cross-sectional wage dispersion. We develop a novel dynamic Roy model that features both static and dynamic comparative advantage and show that it can account for the variation in life cycle wage distributions across high and low wage occupations. Dynamic comparative advantage reflects individual heterogeneity in occupation specific learning abilities and is the dominant force that shapes occupation choice in our model. We highlight several important implications of dynamic comparative advantage and show that our model captures the data better than a benchmark model that features persistent shocks.
34481.zh_abstract: 两个稳健的经验事实是，平均工资和横截面工资离散度都随生命周期增加。我们研究了这两个变化如何在不同职业间变化，并记录了一个强烈的正相关关系：生命周期中平均工资增长高的职业，其横截面工资离散度的增加也更大。我们开发了一个新颖的动态罗伊模型，该模型同时具有静态和动态比较优势，并表明它可以解释高工资和低工资职业间生命周期工资分布的变化。动态比较优势反映了个人在职业特定学习能力上的异质性，并且是我们模型中塑造职业选择的主导力量。我们强调了动态比较优势的几个重要含义，并表明我们的模型比一个具有持续性冲击的基准模型更好地捕捉了数据特征。

34480.title: The Impact of Pay Transparency in Job Postings on the Labor Market
34480.zh_title: 招聘信息中薪酬透明度对劳动力市场的影响
34480.authors: David Arnold, Simon Quach, Bledi Taska
34480.abstract: This paper studies the labor market effects of recent state-level policies that require employers to disclose salary information in job postings. Leveraging a difference-in-differences design, we show that employers increased the fraction of postings with salary information by 30 percentage points. Across three datasets, we find consistent evidence of an increase in wages of 1.3-3.6%. We find no impacts on pay dispersion, employment, the number of postings, or skill and education requirements. Our evidence is consistent with pay transparency increasing competition in the labor market, leading to positive spillovers on incumbent workers and always-posting firms.
34480.zh_abstract: 本文研究了近期州级政策要求雇主在招聘信息中披露薪资信息对劳动力市场的影响。利用双重差分设计，我们表明雇主将包含薪资信息的招聘信息比例提高了30个百分点。基于三个数据集，我们发现了一致的证据，表明工资增长了1.3-3.6%。我们没有发现对薪酬离散度、就业、招聘信息数量或技能与教育要求的影响。我们的证据与薪酬透明度增加劳动力市场竞争、从而对现有员工和始终发布薪资信息的公司产生正向溢出效应的观点一致。

34479.title: Rating Government Procurement Markets
34479.authors: Tatyana Deryugina, Alminas Žaldokas, Anastassia Fedyk, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, James Hodson, Ilona Sologoub
34479.abstract: We develop a novel, scalable method for assessing the quality of public procurement systems using standard administrative data. Our approach compares the distribution of procurement opportunities to the distribution of contract awards across firms. We first derive a simple theoretical benchmark that relates the expected distribution of contract value winning firms, measured as a Herfindahl–Hirschman index (HHI), to the distribution of auction values, measured as a respective HHI, and the number of winning firms. Significant deviations of winning firms’ HHI from this benchmark indicate potential governance failures such as corruption or unchecked collusion. Our method requires no subjective input, is transparent and reproducible, and allows for meaningful comparisons across countries, industry sectors, and over time. We use procurement data from Ukraine and EU member states in 2018–2021 to assess the performance of five large sectors. Results indicate that Ukraine’s procurement performance in four of the five sectors is comparable to many other European countries. However, Ukraine’s construction sector consistently displays the largest excess concentration among all countries considered, consistent with anecdotal evidence of corruption in this sector. Overall, with minimal data requirements, our method offers a practical tool for cross-sector and cross-country assessment of procurement systems.
34479.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种新颖、可扩展的方法，利用标准行政数据评估公共采购系统的质量。我们的方法比较了采购机会的分布与企业间合同授予的分布。我们首先推导出一个简单的理论基准，该基准将中标企业的合同价值分布（以赫芬达尔-赫希曼指数衡量）与拍卖价值的分布（以相应的赫芬达尔-赫希曼指数衡量）以及中标企业数量联系起来。中标企业的赫芬达尔-赫希曼指数显著偏离此基准，则表明可能存在腐败或未受约束的合谋等治理失败。我们的方法不需要主观输入，透明且可复制，并允许在国家、行业部门和不同时期之间进行有意义的比较。我们使用乌克兰和欧盟成员国2018-2021年的采购数据来评估五个大型部门的表现。结果表明，乌克兰在五个部门中的四个部门的采购表现与许多其他欧洲国家相当。然而，乌克兰的建筑部门在所有考虑的国家中持续显示出最大的超额集中度，这与该部门腐败的轶事证据一致。总体而言，在数据需求极低的情况下，我们的方法为跨部门和跨国评估采购系统提供了一个实用工具。

34478.title: Our Underappreciated International Reserve System
34478.zh_title: 我们被低估的国际储备体系
34478.authors: Serkan Arslanalp, Barry Eichengreen, Chima Simpson-Bell
34478.abstract: We document some underappreciated aspects of the recent evolution of the international reserve system. These include the growing share of gold in global central bank reserves, the continuing emergence of nontraditional reserve currencies, and the stalling share of renminbi in reserves. These trends are consistent with our findings in our earlier papers. In addition we look to the future, pondering the potential implications of dollar-linked stablecoins, the expansion of the BRICS grouping of countries and their de- dollarization plans, the development of blockchain-based platforms such as Project mBridge for the direct exchange of central bank digital currencies, and questions about the dollar’s safe-haven status.
34478.zh_abstract: 我们记录了国际储备体系近期演变中一些被低估的方面。这些包括黄金在全球央行储备中占比不断上升、非传统储备货币持续涌现，以及人民币在储备中占比停滞不前。这些趋势与我们早期论文中的发现一致。此外，我们展望未来，思考与美元挂钩的稳定币的潜在影响、金砖国家集团扩大及其去美元化计划、基于区块链的平台（如用于直接交换央行数字货币的mBridge项目）的发展，以及美元避险地位面临的问题。

34477.title: Middlemen in Search Equilibrium: A Survey
34477.zh_title: 搜索均衡中的中间商：综述
34477.authors: Xun (Grace) Gong, Ziqi Qiao, Randall Wright
34477.abstract: This essay surveys the literature on middlemen—i.e., intermediation in exchange—reviewing, extending and consolidating key developments in the field. This is important because intermediated trade is common in reality but absent in standard general equilibrium theory. We focus on research using search theory. In various models, agents may act as middlemen when they are good at search, bargaining, recognizing quality, storing inventories, using credit, etc. The theory applies to markets for goods, inputs or assets. We discuss versions with indivisible or divisible goods, fixed or endogenous participation, stationary and dynamic equilibria, and some implications for efficiency and volatility.
34477.zh_abstract: 本文综述了关于中间商（即交换中的中介）的文献，回顾、扩展并整合了该领域的关键发展。这一点很重要，因为中介交易在现实中很常见，但在标准的一般均衡理论中却不存在。我们聚焦于使用搜索理论的研究。在各种模型中，当代理人擅长搜索、议价、识别质量、储存库存、使用信贷等时，他们可以充当中间商。该理论适用于商品、投入品或资产市场。我们讨论了包含不可分割或可分割商品、固定或内生参与、稳态和动态均衡的版本，以及一些关于效率和波动性的含义。

34476.title: Taxing Identity
34476.abstract: Taxation based on identity has a long, often sordid history, and persists to this day, usually with some subtlety. It is a relatively tame cousin of the blatant, violent, and genocidal policies that have targeted people of certain religions, races, and genders for millennia. It is, nevertheless, an issue to be confronted rather than ignored by public finance economists. This is especially true because the concept of identity played a prominent role in the US presidential election of 2024, and is likely to be at least an undercurrent to the policy debates beginning in 2025, including those concerning tax policy. Tax based on identity is difficult, although not impossible, to justify within standard optimal tax analysis, because in that framework the policy objective is usually framed as being anonymous (impartial) and eschews basing policy on disparate preferences. The most promising justification seems to be if, for example, race is systematically correlated with the failure of income to represent ability to pay. It then acts as a tag that can help achieve the desired allocation of tax burden at minimal efficiency cost. For unjustified identity-based tax policy, analysis can help to spot its existence and quantify its social welfare cost.
34476.zh_abstract: 基于身份的税收有着悠久且往往不光彩的历史，并持续至今，通常带有某种微妙性。它是数千年来针对特定宗教、种族和性别群体的公然、暴力和种族灭绝政策的相对温和的表亲。然而，这是一个公共财政经济学家必须面对而非忽视的问题。这一点尤其正确，因为身份概念在2024年美国总统大选中扮演了突出角色，并且很可能至少成为2025年开始的政策辩论（包括那些关于税收政策的辩论）的潜流。基于身份的税收很难（尽管并非不可能）在标准最优税收分析中得到辩护，因为在该框架中，政策目标通常被设定为匿名（公正）的，并避免基于不同的偏好制定政策。最有可能的辩护似乎是，例如，如果种族与收入未能代表支付能力的系统性相关。那么，它就可以作为一个标签，帮助以最小的效率成本实现理想的税收负担分配。对于不合理的基于身份的税收政策，分析有助于发现其存在并量化其社会福利成本。

34475.title: Stablecoins: A Revolutionary Payment Technology with Financial Risks
34475.zh_title: 稳定币：一种具有金融风险的革命性支付技术
34475.authors: Rashad Ahmed, James A. Clouse, Fabio Natalucci, Alessandro Rebucci, Geyue Sun
34475.abstract: The GENIUS Act, recently signed into law, establishes a dual federal and state regulatory framework for stablecoins, effectively segmenting the USD stablecoin market into GENIUS-compliant stablecoins and those that are not. This paper discusses the use cases and potential benefits of stablecoins in terms of payment system efficiency and costs, as well as their substitutability with money market mutual funds and bank deposits. It then analyzes the financial stability risks associated with both GENIUS-compliant and unregulated stablecoins using empirical analysis and historical case studies. It concludes by discussing the economic implications of the emergence of a large dollar stablecoin ecosystem. The discussion is supported by a new survey of expert opinions canvassed through Large Language Model (LLM) analysis of all U.S. podcast episodes on stablecoins from January 20 to July 17, 2025.
34475.zh_abstract: 最近签署成为法律的GENIUS法案，为稳定币建立了一个联邦和州双重监管框架，有效地将美元稳定币市场划分为符合GENIUS法案的稳定币和不符合的稳定币。本文讨论了稳定币在支付系统效率和成本方面的用例和潜在收益，以及它们与货币市场共同基金和银行存款的可替代性。然后，它通过实证分析和历史案例研究，分析了与符合GENIUS法案和不受监管的稳定币相关的金融稳定风险。最后，它讨论了大型美元稳定币生态系统出现的经济影响。该讨论得到了通过大型语言模型（LLM）分析2025年1月20日至7月17日期间所有美国关于稳定币的播客剧集而收集的专家意见新调查的支持。
34475.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ME, PR；JEL：E42, F33, G21, G23, O33

34474.title: Portfolio Choice and Settlement Frictions: A Theory of Endogenous Convenience Yields
34474.zh_title: 投资组合选择与结算摩擦：内生便利收益理论
34474.abstract: We study settlement frictions that arise from the need to finance negative balances through an over-the-counter (OTC) market. We derive a closed-form expression for the endogenous convenience yield and show how it can be incorporated into a canonical portfolio problem. Using this framework, we examine how shifts in settlement frictions affect liquidity premia, the volume of overnight funding, the dispersion of market rates, and optimal portfolio allocations. From a normative perspective, we show that in the competitive equilibrium, investors may either over- or under-invest in liquid assets; moreover, both higher risk aversion and tighter aggregate liquidity increase the likelihood of under-accumulation.
34474.zh_abstract: 我们研究了因需要通过场外交易（OTC）市场为负头寸融资而产生的结算摩擦。我们推导出内生便利收益的闭式表达式，并展示了如何将其纳入经典的投资组合问题。利用这一框架，我们考察了结算摩擦的变化如何影响流动性溢价、隔夜融资量、市场利率的离散度以及最优投资组合配置。从规范角度来看，我们表明，在竞争均衡中，投资者可能过度或不足地投资于流动性资产；此外，更高的风险厌恶程度和更紧的总体流动性都会增加积累不足的可能性。
34474.meta: Programs：AP, ME；JEL：E40, E44, E49, E50, E52, G11, G21

34473.title: Leniency Designs: An Operator’s Manual
34473.authors: Paul Goldsmith-Pinkham, Peter Hull, Michal Kolesár
34473.abstract: We develop a step-by-step guide to leniency (a.k.a. judge or examiner instrument) designs, drawing on recent econometric literatures. The unbiased jackknife instrumental variables estimator (UJIVE) is purpose-built for leveraging exogenous leniency variation, avoiding subtle biases even in the presence of many decision-makers or controls. We show how UJIVE can also be used to assess key assumptions underlying leniency designs, including quasi-random assignment and average first-stage monotonicity, and to probe the external validity of treatment effect estimates. We further discuss statistical inference, arguing that non-clustered standard errors are often appropriate. A reanalysis of Farre-Mensa et al. (2020), using quasi-random examiner assignment to estimate the value of patents to startups, illustrates our checklist.
34473.zh_abstract: 我们借鉴近期计量经济学文献，开发了一份关于宽大（即法官或审查员工具）设计的逐步指南。无偏刀切工具变量估计量（UJIVE）是专门为利用外生宽大变异而构建的，即使在存在许多决策者或控制变量的情况下也能避免细微偏差。我们展示了UJIVE如何也可用于评估宽大设计背后的关键假设，包括准随机分配和平均第一阶段单调性，并用于探究处理效应估计的外部有效性。我们进一步讨论了统计推断，认为非聚类标准误通常是合适的。对Farre-Mensa等人（2020）的重新分析，利用准随机审查员分配来估计专利对初创企业的价值，说明了我们的检查清单。
34473.meta: Programs：CF, LE, LS, PE, PR；JEL：C01, G0, H0, J0, K0

34472.title: A Note on Factors Influencing Trust in Government
34472.zh_title: 关于影响政府信任因素的说明
34472.authors: Michael J. Boskin, Alexander Kleiner, Ian T. Whiton
34472.abstract: Responses to surveys eliciting evaluations of trust in government, both generally and in specific areas, have varied over time and across countries. Using consistent survey data for 34 OECD countries from 2007-2023, we estimate a model of factors determining levels of trust. We employ a series of econometric techniques of increasing sophistication. The level and growth rate of real income per capita, social spending per capita, the degree of decentralization, and economic freedom all exert positive effects on trust. Inflation, unemployment, and debt per capita negatively affect trust. Additionally, higher levels of human capital and the elderly share of the population negatively affect trust. In the context of trust in government, the estimates suggest a heavier weight on inflation than on unemployment when compared to Okun’s misery index, which weights them equally. Additionally, the estimates are used to evaluate combinations of policies, e.g. debt-financed increases in social spending that affect inflation and/or unemployment, to determine the net effect on trust in government.
34472.zh_abstract: 对政府信任（包括总体信任和特定领域信任）评估的调查回应，在不同时间和国家间有所变化。利用2007-2023年34个OECD国家一致的调查数据，我们估计了一个决定信任水平的因素模型。我们采用了一系列日益复杂的计量经济学技术。实际人均收入水平与增长率、人均社会支出、分权程度和经济自由都对信任产生正向影响。通货膨胀、失业率和人均债务对信任产生负向影响。此外，更高的人力资本水平和老年人口比例对信任产生负向影响。在政府信任的背景下，估计表明，与同等权重的奥肯痛苦指数相比，通货膨胀的权重高于失业率。此外，这些估计被用于评估政策组合，例如影响通货膨胀和/或失业率的债务融资的社会支出增加，以确定对政府信任的净效应。
34472.meta: Programs：PE, POL；JEL：H10, H3, H6, P1, P10, P16, P44

34471.title: Selling to Yourself: Continuation Funds in Private Equity
34471.zh_title: 卖给自己：私募股权中的延续基金
34471.authors: Rustam Abuzov, Will Gornall, Sophie Shive, Ilya A. Strebulaev, Michael S. Weisbach
34471.abstract: Continuation funds (CFs) are private equity structures in which a manager raises a new fund to purchase assets from their existing fund. This structure has surged in popularity, from five funds in 2018 to 130 in 2024. We use a hand-collected sample of 472 CFs to test a model in which heterogeneous preferences drive CFs. Consistent with the model’s predictions, CFs emerge when LPs are more heterogeneous and managers have earned carried interest that they can roll. LPs typically choose to exit rather than invest, with this decision driven by both LP-level frictions and time varying LP liquidity demands.
34471.zh_abstract: 延续基金（CFs）是一种私募股权结构，其中管理人募集一只新基金，从其现有基金购买资产。这种结构迅速流行起来，从2018年的5只基金增加到2024年的130只。我们使用手工收集的472只延续基金样本，检验了一个模型，其中异质性偏好驱动了延续基金。与模型的预测一致，当有限合伙人（LPs）更加异质且管理人已赚取可展期的附带权益时，延续基金就会出现。有限合伙人通常选择退出而非投资，这一决策既受有限合伙人层面摩擦的影响，也受随时间变化的有限合伙人流动性需求的影响。

34470.title: The Race Between Asset Supply and Asset Demand
34470.zh_title: 资产供给与资产需求之间的竞赛
34470.authors: Adrien Auclert, Hannes Malmberg, Matthew Rognlie, Ludwig Straub
34470.abstract: We introduce an asset supply-and-demand approach to analyze the trajectory of US aggregate wealth, real interest rates, and fiscal sustainability. Our framework uses micro-founded and easy-to-implement sufficient statistics to quantify how shifts in demographics, inequality, and other forces affect asset market equilibrium. From 1950 to the present, rapid population aging, rising income inequality, increasing foreign demand for US assets, and declining productivity growth all contributed to a surge in asset demand. Asset supply initially fell, then turned around sharply, mainly driven by increases in government debt and the value of capitalized profits. Overall, asset demand won the race, and interest rates fell. Looking ahead to 2100, population aging will continue to strongly push up asset demand, but at current tax and benefit levels, asset supply will win the race, as rising entitlement costs push up government debt even more. While rising asset demand creates space for debt to eventually reach 250% of GDP without higher interest rates, stabilizing debt at any level requires a permanent fiscal adjustment of at least 10% of GDP.
34470.zh_abstract: 我们引入了一种资产供给与需求的方法来分析美国总财富、实际利率和财政可持续性的轨迹。我们的框架使用基于微观基础且易于实施的充分统计量，来量化人口结构、不平等和其他力量的变化如何影响资产市场均衡。从1950年至今，快速的人口老龄化、不断上升的收入不平等、外国对美国资产需求的增加以及生产率增长的下降，都导致了资产需求的激增。资产供给最初下降，随后急剧逆转，主要受政府债务和资本化利润价值增加的推动。总体而言，资产需求赢得了竞赛，利率下降。展望2100年，人口老龄化将继续强劲推高资产需求，但在当前税收和福利水平下，资产供给将赢得竞赛，因为不断上升的福利成本会进一步推高政府债务。虽然不断上升的资产需求为债务最终达到GDP的250%而不推高利率创造了空间，但在任何水平上稳定债务都需要至少占GDP 10%的永久性财政调整。

34469.title: Disentangling Sources of Variation in C-Section Rates
34469.zh_title: 剖宫产率差异来源的分解
34469.authors: Stefanie J. Fischer, Shuhei Kaneko, Heather Royer, Corey D. White
34469.abstract: Cesarean section rates vary widely across U.S. counties, yet it remains unclear how much of this variation reflects demand-side factors (such as patient risk or preferences) versus supply-side factors (such as physician practices or hospital incentives). We develop a new empirical strategy to isolate the influence of supply-side forces. Exploiting hospital obstetric unit closures from 1989–2019 that reallocate some mothers to counties with different C-section rates, we find that a one–percentage-point increase in the delivery county’s rate raises a mother’s likelihood of a C-section by roughly one point. The results point to a dominant role for provider behavior and local practice norms in driving geographic variation in C-section use, the most common major surgery in the United States.
34469.zh_abstract: 美国各县的剖宫产率差异很大，但尚不清楚这种差异在多大程度上源于需求侧因素（如患者风险或偏好）与供给侧因素（如医生实践或医院激励）。我们开发了一种新的实证策略来分离供给侧力量的影响。利用1989年至2019年间医院产科病房关闭的情况，这些关闭将部分产妇重新分配到剖宫产率不同的县，我们发现，分娩所在县的剖宫产率每提高一个百分点，产妇接受剖宫产的可能性大约增加一个百分点。结果表明，提供者行为和当地实践规范在驱动剖宫产使用的地理差异中起主导作用，剖宫产是美国最常见的大手术。
34469.meta: Programs：CH, EH, PE；JEL：I18, I38, J08, J13, J18

34499.title: Playing Catch-up with Health Savings
34499.authors: Jacob Berman, Adam Bloomfield, Sita Slavov
34499.abstract: We use comprehensive tax data to study how saving behavior responds to the Health Savings Account (HSA) “catch-up” contribution provision, which raises HSA contribution limits for individuals aged 55 and older. Using a regression discontinuity design, we find a sharp increase in contributions among those previously near the limit and smaller increases among unconstrained savers. Induced contributions are not immediately withdrawn and do not appear to crowd out retirement savings. Responses are strongest among payroll contributors and long-term savers. However, married couples do not appear to coordinate their HSA behavior to take advantage of the complex spousal rules governing catch-up contributions. Our findings highlight how tax incentives shape HSA saving and suggest that tax-advantaged account design meaningfully affects household financial behavior.
34499.zh_abstract: 我们利用全面的税收数据研究储蓄行为如何响应健康储蓄账户的“追赶”缴款条款，该条款提高了55岁及以上个人的健康储蓄账户缴款限额。使用断点回归设计，我们发现那些此前接近限额的人缴款急剧增加，而未受约束的储蓄者增加幅度较小。诱导性缴款并未立即被提取，似乎也没有挤出退休储蓄。反应在工资扣缴者和长期储蓄者中最为强烈。然而，已婚夫妇似乎并未协调他们的健康储蓄账户行为以利用管理追赶缴款的复杂配偶规则。我们的发现突显了税收激励如何塑造健康储蓄账户储蓄，并表明税收优惠账户设计显著影响家庭财务行为。
34499.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PE；JEL：G51, H31, I13, J26

34498.title: Labor Market Strength and Declining Community College Enrollment
34498.zh_title: 劳动力市场强劲与社区大学入学率下降
34498.abstract: Declining U.S. college enrollments over the past 15 years have triggered questions about the health of the postsecondary sector. Using institution-level data, we make four points. First, such declines are driven not by the four-year sector but by two-year community colleges, which have apparently shrunk by over 30% since the peak of the Great Recession. Second, over one-third of this apparent decline is an artifact of some community colleges being reclassified as offering four-year degrees. Third, pre-Great Recession data shows a 1 percentage point increase in the local unemployment rate increases first-time community college enrollment by 2 percent, suggesting many students are on the margin between community college and job opportunities. For-profit college enrollments are similarly countercyclical, while public and private four-year college enrollments appear acyclical. Our estimates suggest that strengthening labor markets explain about 60% of the post-Great Recession decline in first-time community college enrollment. Fourth, students whose enrollment decisions are most sensitive to labor market conditions appear unlikely to have completed a degree. Though declining community college enrollments are a challenge for postsecondary institutions, it is less clear whether they signal a problem for students on the margin of enrollment.
34498.zh_abstract: 过去15年美国大学入学率的下降引发了关于高等教育部门健康状况的疑问。利用机构层面数据，我们提出四点。首先，这种下降并非由四年制大学部门驱动，而是由两年制社区大学驱动，自大衰退高峰期以来，社区大学入学率显然下降了超过30%。其次，这种明显下降中超过三分之一是由于一些社区大学被重新分类为提供四年制学位所致。第三，大衰退前的数据显示，当地失业率每上升1个百分点，首次社区大学入学率就会增加2%，这表明许多学生在社区大学和就业机会之间处于边际状态。营利性大学的入学率同样呈现反周期特征，而公立和私立四年制大学的入学率似乎呈非周期性。我们的估计表明，劳动力市场走强解释了后大衰退时期首次社区大学入学率下降的约60%。第四，其入学决策对劳动力市场条件最敏感的学生似乎不太可能完成学位。尽管社区大学入学率下降对高等教育机构构成挑战，但这是否预示着处于入学边缘的学生存在问题，尚不明确。

34497.title: Internal vs. External Shocks in Weakening Democracies: Evidence on Migration and Foreign Investment
34497.zh_title: 民主弱化中的内部冲击与外部冲击：来自移民和外国投资的证据
34497.abstract: This paper investigates the consequences of regime change for both migration and foreign direct investment (FDI) by employing quasi-natural experiments that exploit external and internal shocks to democratic institutions. It compares evidence from Europe, which was afflicted by the “Syrian Shock”—an external institutional stress testing administrative and fiscal capacity—and Israel, which experienced the “Corruption Shock”—an internal credibility crisis that eroded judicial independence and policy predictability. These two shocks provide a natural experiment to examine how weakening democratic institutions influence both capital mobility and people mobility, using a unified econometric framework. \nThe analysis applies Difference-in-Differences (DiD) estimation to OECD panel data spanning 1995–2023 to isolate the causal effects of institutional deterioration on FDI inflows and migration flows. The DiD approach, complemented by fixed effects at the country and year levels, captures both the short-term disruptions caused by exogenous humanitarian pressures and the long-term persistence of governance-driven uncertainty. The results demonstrate that internal shocks—such as Israel’s judicial and corruption crises—generate large and durable declines in FDI and sustained outward migration, while external shocks—such as Europe’s refugee crisis—produce more transient effect.
34497.zh_abstract: 本文通过利用准自然实验来研究政权更迭对移民和外国直接投资的后果，这些实验利用了民主制度的外部冲击和内部冲击。它比较了来自欧洲和以色列的证据，欧洲遭受了“叙利亚冲击”——一种对行政和财政能力进行压力测试的外部制度冲击，而以色列经历了“腐败冲击”——一种侵蚀司法独立性和政策可预测性的内部信誉危机。这两种冲击提供了一个自然实验，使用统一的经济计量框架来检验民主制度弱化如何影响资本流动和人员流动。该分析对1995年至2023年的经合组织面板数据应用了双重差分估计，以隔离制度恶化对外国直接投资流入和移民流动的因果效应。双重差分方法辅以国家和年份层面的固定效应，捕捉了外生人道主义压力造成的短期干扰以及治理驱动不确定性的长期持续性。结果表明，内部冲击——如以色列的司法和腐败危机——导致外国直接投资大幅且持久地下降以及持续的向外移民，而外部冲击——如欧洲的难民危机——产生的影响更为短暂。

34496.title: Tracking the Short-Run Price Impact of U.S. Tariffs
34496.zh_title: 追踪美国关税的短期价格影响
34496.authors: Alberto Cavallo, Paola Llamas, Franco M. Vazquez
34496.abstract: We use high-frequency retail microdata to measure the short-run impact of the 2025 U.S. tariffs on consumer prices. By matching daily prices from major U.S. retailers to product-level tariff rates and countries of origin, we construct price indices that isolate the direct effects of tariff changes across goods and trading partners. Prices began rising immediately after the broader tariff measures announced in early March and continued to increase gradually over subsequent months, with imported goods rising roughly twice as much as domestic ones. Our estimated retail tariff pass-through is 20 percent, with a cumulative contribution of about 0.7 percentage points to the all-items Consumer Price Index by September 2025. Our results show that tariff costs were gradually but steadily transmitted to U.S. consumers, with additional spillovers to domestic goods.
34496.zh_abstract: 我们使用高频零售微观数据来衡量2025年美国关税对消费者价格的短期影响。通过将美国主要零售商的每日价格与产品层面的关税税率和原产国进行匹配，我们构建了价格指数，以隔离关税变化在不同商品和贸易伙伴之间的直接影响。价格在3月初宣布更广泛的关税措施后立即开始上涨，并在随后的几个月里继续逐步上升，进口商品的涨幅大约是国产商品的两倍。我们估计的零售关税传导率为20%，到2025年9月对整体消费者价格指数的累计贡献约为0.7个百分点。我们的结果表明，关税成本逐渐但稳定地传导给了美国消费者，并对国内商品产生了额外的溢出效应。

34495.title: Laptops in the Long Run: Evidence from the One Laptop per Child Program in Rural Peru
34495.zh_title: 长期中的笔记本电脑：来自秘鲁农村“每个儿童一台笔记本电脑”项目的证据
34495.authors: Santiago Cueto, Diether W. Beuermann, Julian Cristia, Ofer Malamud, Francisco Pardo
34495.abstract: This paper examines a large-scale randomized evaluation of the One Laptop Per Child (OLPC) program in 531 Peruvian rural primary schools. We use administrative data on academic performance and grade progression over 10 years to estimate the long-run effects of increased computer access on (i) school performance over time and (ii) students’ educational trajectories. Following schools over time, we find no significant effects on academic performance but some evidence of negative effects on grade progression. Following students over time, we find no significant effects on primary and secondary completion, academic performance in secondary school, or university enrollment. Survey data indicate that computer access significantly improved students’ computer skills but not their cognitive skills; treated teachers received some training but did not improve their digital skills and showed limited use of technology in classrooms, suggesting the need for additional pedagogical support.
34495.zh_abstract: 本文考察了在秘鲁531所农村小学进行的“每个儿童一台笔记本电脑”项目的大规模随机评估。我们使用10年间的学业表现和年级晋升行政数据，来估计增加计算机接入对以下方面的长期影响：（i）随时间变化的学校表现，以及（ii）学生的教育轨迹。通过追踪学校随时间的变化，我们发现对学业表现没有显著影响，但有一些证据表明对年级晋升有负面影响。通过追踪学生随时间的变化，我们发现对小学和中学毕业率、中学学业表现或大学入学率没有显著影响。调查数据表明，计算机接入显著提高了学生的计算机技能，但并未提高他们的认知技能；接受过培训的教师获得了一些培训，但数字技能并未提高，并且在课堂上使用技术有限，这表明需要额外的教学支持。

34494.title: GCAP Public Security-Level Data on U.S. Fund Holdings
34494.zh_title: GCAP美国基金持仓公共安全级别数据
34494.authors: Bruno Cavani, Matteo Maggiori, Jesse Schreger
34494.abstract: We construct representative security-fund-level longitudinal data for the United States using regulatory filings of portfolio holdings from Form N-PORT. We validate our dataset by comparing coverage and composition to official statistics from the Federal Reserve’s Financial Accounts of the United States (formerly known as the Flow of Funds) and Treasury International Capital (TIC) System, and to micro-level commercial datasets. We showcase an application by replicating and updating Maggiori, Neiman and Schreger (2020) findings on home currency bias using N-PORT instead of commercial fund holdings data. Our results confirm that N-PORT data offer a comprehensive, reliable, and public source for research in macroeconomics and finance. We make all the security-level data on holdings available in a public repository of the GCAP Lab and provide code for updating the data.
34494.zh_abstract: 我们利用N-PORT表格中投资组合持仓的监管申报文件，构建了具有代表性的美国证券-基金层面纵向数据。我们通过将覆盖范围和构成与美联储美国金融账户（前身为资金流量表）和财政部国际资本系统的官方统计数据，以及微观层面的商业数据集进行比较，来验证我们的数据集。我们通过使用N-PORT数据而非商业基金持仓数据，复制并更新了Maggiori, Neiman和Schreger（2020）关于本币偏好的发现，展示了一个应用实例。我们的结果证实，N-PORT数据为宏观经济学和金融学研究提供了全面、可靠且公开的数据来源。我们将所有证券层面的持仓数据存放在GCAP实验室的公共存储库中，并提供用于更新数据的代码。

34493.title: Forecasting Social Science: Evidence from 100 Projects
34493.zh_title: 预测社会科学：来自100个项目的证据
34493.abstract: Forecasts about research findings affect critical scientific decisions, such as the treatments an R&D lab invests in or the statistical power of an experiment. How accurate are these forecasts, and what are the implications of potentially inaccurate beliefs? We analyze a unique data set of all 100 projects posted on the Social Science Prediction Platform from 2020 to 2024, which received 53,298 forecasts in total, including 66 projects for which we have results. We show that forecasters, on average, over-estimate treatment effects; however, the average forecast is quite predictive of the actual treatment effect. We also examine differences in accuracy. Academics have higher accuracy than non-academics, but expertise in a field does not increase accuracy. A panel of motivated repeat forecasters has higher accuracy, but this does not extend to all repeat forecasters. Confidence in the accuracy of one’s forecasts is perversely associated with lower accuracy. We also document substantial cross-study correlation in accuracy and identify a group of "superforecasters". Integrating these lessons, we show how to design optimal forecasts that are appropriately shrunk and that place more weight on high-accuracy predictions. We then highlight how these optimal forecasts can be used in experimental design to increase statistical power.
34493.zh_abstract: 关于研究结果的预测会影响关键的科学决策，例如研发实验室投资何种治疗方法，或实验的统计功效。这些预测的准确度如何？潜在不准确信念的影响又是什么？我们分析了一个独特的数据集，该数据集包含2020年至2024年间在社会科学预测平台上发布的所有100个项目，共收到53,298个预测，其中66个项目已有结果。我们表明，预测者平均而言高估了处理效应；然而，平均预测值对实际处理效应具有很强的预测能力。我们还考察了准确度的差异。学术界的准确度高于非学术界，但某一领域的专业知识并不会提高准确度。由积极重复预测者组成的小组准确度更高，但这并不适用于所有重复预测者。对自己预测准确度的信心与较低的准确度反常地相关。我们还记录了跨研究准确度的显著相关性，并识别出一组“超级预测者”。综合这些经验教训，我们展示了如何设计经过适当收缩并赋予高准确度预测更多权重的优化预测。然后，我们强调了这些优化预测如何用于实验设计以提高统计功效。
34493.meta: Programs：AG, AP, CH, DEV, ED, EEE, EFG, EH, IO, ITI, LS, ME, PE, POL, PR；JEL：D01, D91, O12

34492.title: The Logic of State Surveillance
34492.abstract: All states adopt systems to surveil political activists. How do they decide whom to watch and why? We study the logic of state surveillance using the first complete individual-level database of those monitored by a state — 152,000 Italians born between 1816 and 1932, encompassing both democratic and authoritarian regimes. We focus on education: exploiting a discontinuous expansion in primary schooling in municipalities above a population and age threshold, we show that cohorts exposed to more years of school experienced an uptick in surveillance. The effect is largest for working classes, who were monitored for longer periods, subjected to harsher measures, and disproportionately targeted when affiliated with communist ideologies. Yet treated cohorts did not become more politically active, indicating that surveillance expanded not in reaction to increased mobilization, but as a preventive strategy rooted in fears of working-class empowerment. These findings reveal how states view educated yet excluded groups as politically threatening and prioritize their surveillance, potentially generating inequalities in groups' ability to influence political change.
34492.zh_abstract: 所有国家都采用系统来监控政治活动家。他们如何决定监控谁以及为何监控？我们利用首个完整的、由国家监控的个人层面数据库——涵盖1816年至1932年间出生的15.2万名意大利人，跨越民主和威权政权——来研究国家监控的逻辑。我们聚焦于教育：利用在人口和年龄阈值以上的城市中初等教育的非连续扩张，我们表明，接受更多学年教育的群体经历了监控的增加。这种效应在工人阶级中最为显著，他们被监控的时间更长，遭受更严厉的措施，并且在隶属于共产主义意识形态时被不成比例地针对。然而，受处理的群体并未变得更加政治活跃，这表明监控的扩大并非是对动员增加的反应，而是源于对工人阶级赋权的恐惧而采取的一种预防性策略。这些发现揭示了国家如何将受过教育但被排斥的群体视为政治威胁，并优先对其进行监控，这可能导致群体影响政治变革能力的不平等。

34491.title: Predictably Unpredictable Inspections
34491.zh_title: 可预测的不可预测检查
34491.authors: Ashvin Gandhi, Andrew Olenski, Maggie Shi
34491.abstract: Inspections are a common tool for acquiring information and incentivizing compliance. Although inspections are typically unannounced, their timing often follows a predictable schedule. We study how this predictability shapes firm effort and patient outcomes in U.S. nursing homes, leveraging detailed administrative data on staffing, care, and health outcomes. Nursing homes "slack" in the low-risk period following an inspection and ramp up effort as their next inspection approaches. Patient survival mirrors this pattern, suggesting that these fluctuations in effort have meaningful consequences for the quality of patient care. We embed these estimates in a dynamic model capturing how inspection regimes incentivize effort and provide information about quality. Our estimates indicate that moving to unpredictable inspections could induce as much additional effort as increasing the frequency of inspections by 12%, while only minimally reducing their informational value.
34491.zh_abstract: 检查是获取信息和激励合规的常用工具。尽管检查通常不事先通知，但其时间安排往往遵循可预测的时间表。我们利用关于人员配置、护理和健康结果的详细行政数据，研究了这种可预测性如何影响美国养老院的努力水平和患者结果。养老院在检查后的低风险期“懈怠”，并在下一次检查临近时加大努力。患者生存率反映了这一模式，表明这些努力水平的波动对患者护理质量具有重要影响。我们将这些估计嵌入一个动态模型中，该模型捕捉了检查制度如何激励努力并提供关于质量的信息。我们的估计表明，转向不可预测的检查可以诱导出相当于将检查频率提高12%的额外努力，同时仅最小程度地降低其信息价值。

34490.title: An Anatomy of the Great Reallocation in US Supply Chain Trade
34490.zh_title: 美国供应链贸易大重组的剖析
34490.abstract: This paper documents stylized facts about the “Great Reallocation” in US supply chain trade following the 2018–2019 tariff shocks and the April 2025 Liberation Day announcements. We find that: (i) The US has decoupled from China but not from the world overall. (ii) US imports diversified mainly among its top-20 partners, rather than expanding to new source countries. (iii) Local linear projections confirm ongoing declines in China’s import shares, with compensating increases from Vietnam, Mexico, and Taiwan. (iv) Most of this shift occurred along the product-level intensive margin, though extensive margin adjustments became more pronounced for Vietnam and India from 2021-2024. (v) After a period of “wait and see”, the decline in import shares from China spread to contract-intensive and relationship-sticky goods by 2021-2024. (vi) Trade reallocation has already accelerated after Liberation Day, in favor of trade partners facing lower additional tariffs and with geographically proximate supply networks. Together, these findings show that the US-China tariff shocks have unwound the US’ sourcing from China back to where it stood at the time of China’s WTO accession.
34490.zh_abstract: 本文记录了2018-2019年关税冲击和2025年4月解放日公告后美国供应链贸易“大重组”的典型事实。我们发现：(i) 美国已与中国脱钩，但并未与整个世界脱钩。(ii) 美国进口主要在其前20大伙伴国之间多元化，而非扩展到新的来源国。(iii) 局部线性投影证实了中国进口份额持续下降，而越南、墨西哥和台湾的份额则有所补偿性增加。(iv) 这种转变大部分发生在产品层面的集约边际上，但在2021-2024年间，越南和印度的广延边际调整变得更加显著。(v) 经过一段“观望”期后，来自中国的进口份额下降在2021-2024年间蔓延到了合同密集型和关系粘性商品。(vi) 贸易重组在解放日后已经加速，有利于面临较低额外关税且拥有地理邻近供应网络的贸易伙伴。这些发现共同表明，美中关税冲击已将美国从中国的采购回退到中国加入世贸组织时的水平。

34489.title: Beliefs and Portfolios: Causal Evidence
34489.zh_title: 信念与投资组合：因果证据
34489.abstract: We causally test alternative theories of expectation formation. Using a randomized information experiment we show overreaction is a key feature of individuals' return expectations, and individuals' response to the price-earnings ratio is opposite to the academic consensus. Our evidence is inconsistent with standard models of expectation formation but subjective mental models that deviate from objective benchmarks can jointly explain the updating behavior in the experiment, the link between individuals' prior perceptions and expectations, and the heterogeneity of updating. Conditional on their beliefs, individuals' sensitivity of equity shares in a hypothetical portfolio choice experiment is consistent with the standard Merton model.
34489.zh_abstract: 我们对预期形成的替代理论进行了因果检验。通过一项随机信息实验，我们表明过度反应是个人收益预期的一个关键特征，并且个人对市盈率的反应与学术共识相反。我们的证据与标准的预期形成模型不一致，但偏离客观基准的主观心智模型可以共同解释实验中的更新行为、个人先验认知与预期之间的联系，以及更新的异质性。在给定其信念的条件下，个人在假设性投资组合选择实验中对股权份额的敏感度与标准的默顿模型一致。
